32	  DOCKER_SCHEME: http
33	
34	  # ── Docker ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
35	  DOCKER_SERVICE: app
36	
37	  # ── Timeouts ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
38	  START_TIMEOUT: '30'
39	  STOP_TIMEOUT: '15'
40	
41	tasks:
42	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
43	  # HELP
44	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
45	  help:
46	    desc: Toon overzicht van beschikbare commando's
47	    silent: false
48	    cmds:
49	      - |
50	        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== {{.APP_NAME}} ===\033[0m\n"
51	        printf "\033[1mdev port:\033[0m  %s\n" "{{.DEV_PORT}}"
52	        printf "\033[1mprod port:\033[0m %s\n" "{{.PROD_PORT}}"
53	        printf "\n\033[1;33mLifecycle:\033[0m\n"
54	        printf "  \033[32mtask setup\033[0m        bootstrap dependencies + health-check\n"
55	        printf "  \033[32mtask setup-quick\033[0m  snelle setup (alleen install)\n"
56	        printf "  \033[32mtask dev-setup\033[0m    volledige developer setup\n"
57	        printf "  \033[32mtask start\033[0m        start development server\n"
58	        printf "  \033[32mtask start-frontend\033[0m start frontend alias\n"
59	        printf "  \033[32mtask start-prod\033[0m   start productie server\n"
60	        printf "  \033[32mtask stop\033[0m         stop alle services\n"
61	        printf "  \033[32mtask stop-frontend\033[0m stop frontend alias\n"
62	        printf "  \033[32mtask restart\033[0m      herstart development server\n"
63	        printf "  \033[32mtask restart-frontend\033[0m herstart frontend alias\n"
64	        printf "  \033[32mtask status\033[0m       service status + endpoints\n"
65	        printf "  \033[32mtask logs\033[0m         volg development logs\n"
66	        printf "  \033[32mtask logs-frontend\033[0m volg frontend logs alias\n"
67	        printf "\n\033[1;33mProject:\033[0m\n"
68	        printf "  \033[32mtask build\033[0m          build voor productie\n"
69	        printf "  \033[32mtask test\033[0m           run tests (jest)\n"
70	        printf "  \033[32mtask test:watch\033[0m     tests in watch mode\n"
71	        printf "  \033[32mtask test:coverage\033[0m  tests met coverage\n"
72	        printf "  \033[32mtask test:e2e\033[0m       end-to-end tests (Playwright)\n"
73	        printf "  \033[32mtask lint\033[0m           lint code\n"
74	        printf "  \033[32mtask lint:fix\033[0m       auto-fix lint issues\n"
75	        printf "  \033[32mtask format\033[0m         format code (prettier)\n"
76	        printf "  \033[32mtask format:check\033[0m   check formatting\n"
77	        printf "  \033[32mtask type-check\033[0m     TypeScript type-check\n"
78	        printf "  \033[32mtask check\033[0m          lint + type-check + format-check\n"
79	        printf "\n\033[1;33mMaintenance:\033[0m\n"
80	        printf "  \033[32mtask clean\033[0m        verwijder build-artefacten\n"
81	        printf "  \033[32mtask clean:cache\033[0m  verwijder caches\n"
82	        printf "  \033[32mtask clean:all\033[0m    verwijder alles (node_modules + artefacten)\n"
83	        printf "  \033[32mtask clean:logs\033[0m   verwijder logbestanden\n"
84	        printf "  \033[32mtask uninstall\033[0m    verwijder node_modules en caches\n"
85	        printf "  \033[32mtask backup-config\033[0m backup configuratiebestanden\n"
86	        printf "\n\033[1;33mDocker:\033[0m\n"
87	        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:build\033[0m   build Docker image\n"
88	        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:up\033[0m      start containers\n"
89	        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:down\033[0m    stop containers\n"
90	        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:logs\033[0m    volg Docker logs\n"
91	        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:rebuild\033[0m rebuild + herstart\n"
92	        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:shell\033[0m   shell in container\n"
93	        printf "\n"
94	
95	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
96	  # SETUP
97	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
98	  setup:
99	    desc: Install dependencies + env bootstrap + health-check
100	    silent: false
101	    cmds:
102	      - task: _ensure-dirs
103	      - task: install
104	      - task: _bootstrap-env
105	      - task: doctor
106	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Setup voltooid\n"
107	
108	  setup-quick:
109	    desc: Snelle setup (install + env bootstrap indien mogelijk)
110	    cmds:
111	      - task: install
112	      - task: _bootstrap-env
113	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Quick setup voltooid\n"
114	
115	  dev-setup:
116	    desc: Volledige developer setup (install + env bootstrap + doctor + build)
117	    silent: false
118	    cmds:
119	      - task: _ensure-dirs
120	      - task: install
121	      - task: _bootstrap-env
122	      - task: doctor
123	      - task: _build-check
124	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Developer setup voltooid\n"
125	
126	  install:
127	    desc: Install dependencies
128	    cmds:
129	      - '{{.INSTALL_CMD}}'
130	
131	  uninstall:
132	    desc: Verwijder node_modules en caches
133	    cmds:
134	      - |
135	        rm -rf node_modules .next .turbo 2>/dev/null || true
136	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m node_modules en caches verwijderd\n"
137	
138	  doctor:
139	    desc: Health-check (vereiste tools aanwezig?)
140	    silent: false
141	    cmds:
142	      - |
143	        _has() { command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; }
144	        MISSING=""
145	        WARN=""
146	        _has task   || MISSING="$MISSING task"
147	        _has node   || MISSING="$MISSING node"
148	        _has pnpm   || MISSING="$MISSING pnpm"
149	        _has docker || WARN="$WARN docker"
150	        # fnm: check PATH en bekende installatiepaden
151	        if _has fnm; then
152	          FNM_V=$(fnm --version 2>/dev/null)
153	        elif [ -x "$HOME/.local/share/fnm/fnm" ]; then
154	          FNM_V=$("$HOME/.local/share/fnm/fnm" --version 2>/dev/null)
155	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m fnm gevonden in ~/.local/share/fnm/ maar niet in PATH\n"
156	        else
157	          WARN="$WARN fnm"
158	        fi
159	        if [ -n "$MISSING" ]; then
160	          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Ontbrekende tools:%s\n" "$MISSING"
161	          exit 1
162	        fi
163	        [ -n "$WARN" ] && printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Optionele tools niet gevonden:%s\n" "$WARN"
164	        NODE_V=$(node -v 2>/dev/null)
165	        PNPM_V=$(pnpm -v 2>/dev/null)
166	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Vereiste tools aanwezig (node %s, pnpm %s" "$NODE_V" "$PNPM_V"
167	        [ -n "$FNM_V" ] && printf ", %s" "$FNM_V"
168	        printf ")\n"
169	
170	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
171	  # LIFECYCLE
172	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
173	  start:
174	    desc: Start development server
175	    silent: false
176	    cmds:
177	      - task: _ensure-ready
178	      - task: _ensure-dirs
179	      - task: _kill-mode
180	        vars:
181	          TARGET_PORT: '{{.DEV_PORT}}'
182	          PID_FILE: '{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/dev.pid'
183	      - |
184	        DEV_CMD='{{.DEV_CMD}}'
185	        if [ -f "{{.DEV_CERT_FILE}}" ] && [ -f "{{.DEV_KEY_FILE}}" ]; then
186	          DEV_CMD="$DEV_CMD --experimental-https --experimental-https-cert {{.DEV_CERT_FILE}} --experimental-https-key {{.DEV_KEY_FILE}}"
187	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Gebruik bestaand HTTPS certificaat uit {{.DEV_CERT_FILE}} en {{.DEV_KEY_FILE}}\n"
188	        else
189	          DEV_CMD="$DEV_CMD --experimental-https"
190	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen lokaal HTTPS certificaat gevonden; eerste run kan een sudo-prompt geven voor certificaatgeneratie\n"
191	        fi
192	        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Starting {{.APP_NAME}} op poort {{.DEV_PORT}}...\n"
193	        : > "{{.DEV_LOG}}"
194	        if command -v setsid >/dev/null 2>&1; then
195	          nohup setsid bash -lc "$DEV_CMD" >> "{{.DEV_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
196	        else
197	          nohup bash -lc "$DEV_CMD" >> "{{.DEV_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
198	        fi
199	      - task: _wait-for-endpoint
200	        vars:
201	          LABEL: development
202	          PORT: '{{.DEV_PORT}}'
203	          SCHEME: '{{.DEV_SCHEME}}'
204	          HOST: 127.0.0.1
205	          LOG_FILE: '{{.DEV_LOG}}'
206	      - |
207	        REAL_PID=$(fuser "{{.DEV_PORT}}"/tcp 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')
208	        if [ -z "$REAL_PID" ]; then
209	          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Development server reageert, maar PID kon niet bepaald worden op poort {{.DEV_PORT}}\n"
210	          exit 1
211	        fi
212	        echo "$REAL_PID" > "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/dev.pid"
213	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Development server draait op {{.DEV_SCHEME}}://localhost:{{.DEV_PORT}} (PID %s)\n" "$REAL_PID"
214	      - task: _show-endpoints
215	        vars:
216	          LABEL: development
217	          PORT: '{{.DEV_PORT}}'
218	          SCHEME: '{{.DEV_SCHEME}}'
219	
220	  start-prod:
221	    desc: Start productie server (vereist build)
222	    silent: false
223	    cmds:
224	      - task: _ensure-ready
225	      - task: _ensure-dirs
226	      - task: _kill-mode
227	        vars:
228	          TARGET_PORT: '{{.PROD_PORT}}'
229	          PID_FILE: '{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/prod.pid'
230	      - |
231	        if [ ! -d ".next" ]; then
232	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen build gevonden, eerst builden...\n"
233	          pnpm run build
234	        fi
235	        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Starting {{.APP_NAME}} (prod) op poort {{.PROD_PORT}}...\n"
236	        : > "{{.PROD_LOG}}"
237	        if command -v setsid >/dev/null 2>&1; then
238	          nohup setsid bash -lc "{{.PROD_CMD}}" >> "{{.PROD_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
239	        else
240	          nohup bash -lc "{{.PROD_CMD}}" >> "{{.PROD_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
241	        fi
242	      - task: _wait-for-endpoint
243	        vars:
244	          LABEL: production
245	          PORT: '{{.PROD_PORT}}'
246	          SCHEME: '{{.PROD_SCHEME}}'
247	          HOST: 127.0.0.1
248	          LOG_FILE: '{{.PROD_LOG}}'
249	      - |
250	        REAL_PID=$(fuser "{{.PROD_PORT}}"/tcp 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')
251	        if [ -z "$REAL_PID" ]; then
252	          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Productie server reageert, maar PID kon niet bepaald worden op poort {{.PROD_PORT}}\n"
253	          exit 1
254	        fi
255	        echo "$REAL_PID" > "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/prod.pid"
256	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Productie server draait op {{.PROD_SCHEME}}://localhost:{{.PROD_PORT}} (PID %s)\n" "$REAL_PID"
257	      - task: _show-endpoints
258	        vars:
259	          LABEL: production
260	          PORT: '{{.PROD_PORT}}'
261	          SCHEME: '{{.PROD_SCHEME}}'
262	
263	  stop:
264	    desc: Stop alle services
265	    silent: false
266	    cmds:
267	      - |
268	        STOPPED=0
269	        for NAME in dev prod; do
270	          if [ "$NAME" = "dev" ]; then PORT="{{.DEV_PORT}}"; else PORT="{{.PROD_PORT}}"; fi
271	          PIDFILE="{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/${NAME}.pid"
272	          # Stop via PID-bestand
273	          if [ -f "$PIDFILE" ]; then
274	            PID=$(head -1 "$PIDFILE" 2>/dev/null)
275	            if /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null; then
276	              /bin/kill -TERM "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
277	              WAITED=0
278	              while /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && [ "$WAITED" -lt "{{.STOP_TIMEOUT}}" ]; do
279	                sleep 1; WAITED=$((WAITED + 1))
280	              done
281	              /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && /bin/kill -KILL "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
282	              printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m %s gestopt (PID %s)\n" "$NAME" "$PID"
283	              STOPPED=1
284	            fi
285	            rm -f "$PIDFILE"
286	          fi
287	          # Laatste fallback: kill alles op de poort (pnpm kan orphan-processen achterlaten)
288	          if fuser "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
289	            fuser -k "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
290	            sleep 1
291	            fuser "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 && fuser -k -KILL "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
292	            printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m %s gestopt via poort %s (orphan cleanup)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT"
293	            STOPPED=1
294	          fi
295	        done
296	        if [ "$STOPPED" = "0" ]; then
297	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen draaiende services gevonden\n"
298	        fi
299	
300	  restart:
301	    desc: Herstart development server
302	    silent: false
303	    cmds:
304	      - task: stop
305	      - |
306	        sleep 1
307	      - task: start
308	
309	  status:
310	    desc: Service status
311	    silent: false
312	    cmds:
313	      - |
314	        _port_online() {
315	          local P="$1"
316	          local S="$2"
317	          local CURL_EXTRA=""
318	          if [ "$S" = "https" ]; then
319	            CURL_EXTRA="-k"
320	          fi
321	          if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
322	            CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "${S}://127.0.0.1:${P}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
323	            if [ "$CODE" != "000" ]; then
324	              return 0
325	            fi
326	          fi
327	          if command -v fuser >/dev/null 2>&1; then
328	            if fuser "$P"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
329	              return 0
330	            fi
331	          fi
332	          return 1
333	        }
334	        printf "\033[1;36m=== Service status ===\033[0m\n"
335	        for NAME in dev prod; do
336	          if [ "$NAME" = "dev" ]; then PORT="{{.DEV_PORT}}"; SCHEME="{{.DEV_SCHEME}}"; else PORT="{{.PROD_PORT}}"; SCHEME="{{.PROD_SCHEME}}"; fi
337	          PIDFILE="{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/${NAME}.pid"
338	          PID=""
339	          if [ -f "$PIDFILE" ]; then
340	            PID=$(head -1 "$PIDFILE" 2>/dev/null || true)
341	          fi
342	          PID_RUNNING=0
343	          if [ -n "$PID" ]; then
344	            /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && PID_RUNNING=1
345	          fi
346	          if _port_online "$PORT" "$SCHEME"; then
347	            if [ "$PID_RUNNING" = "1" ]; then
348	              printf "\033[32m[RUNNING]\033[0m  %s  (poort %s, PID %s)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT" "$PID"
349	            else
350	              printf "\033[33m[RUNNING]\033[0m  %s  (poort %s, niet via task gestart)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT"
351	            fi
352	          elif [ "$PID_RUNNING" = "1" ]; then
353	            printf "\033[33m[STARTING]\033[0m %s  (proces actief, poort %s nog niet online)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT"
354	          else
355	            if [ -n "$PID" ]; then
356	              rm -f "$PIDFILE" 2>/dev/null || true
357	            fi
358	            printf "\033[31m[STOPPED]\033[0m  %s\n" "$NAME"
359	          fi
360	        done
361	      - task: _show-endpoints
362	        vars:
363	          LABEL: development
364	          PORT: '{{.DEV_PORT}}'
365	          SCHEME: '{{.DEV_SCHEME}}'
366	      - task: _show-endpoints
367	        vars:
368	          LABEL: production
369	          PORT: '{{.PROD_PORT}}'
370	          SCHEME: '{{.PROD_SCHEME}}'
371	
372	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
373	  # LOGS
374	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
375	  logs:
376	    desc: Volg development logs
377	    cmds:
378	      - |
379	        test -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}" || { printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen logbestand gevonden ({{.DEV_LOG}})\n"; exit 0; }
380	        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Volgen van {{.DEV_LOG}} (Ctrl+C om te stoppen)\n"
381	        tail -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}"
382	
383	  logs-tail:
384	    desc: Laatste 50 regels + follow
385	    cmds:
386	      - |
387	        test -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}" || { printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen logbestand gevonden\n"; exit 0; }
388	        tail -n 50 -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}"
389	
390	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
391	  # MAINTENANCE
392	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
393	  clean:
394	    desc: Verwijder build-artefacten
395	    cmds:
396	      - |
397	        rm -rf .next dist build out coverage 2>/dev/null || true
398	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Build-artefacten opgeruimd\n"
399	
400	  clean-cache:
401	    desc: Verwijder caches (.next, .turbo)
402	    cmds:
403	      - |
404	        rm -rf .next .turbo 2>/dev/null || true
405	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Caches opgeruimd\n"
406	
407	  clean-all:
408	    desc: Verwijder alles (node_modules + build-artefacten + caches)
409	    cmds:
410	      - |
411	        rm -rf node_modules .next dist build out coverage .turbo 2>/dev/null || true
412	        rm -rf "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}" 2>/dev/null || true
413	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Alles opgeruimd\n"
414	
415	  clean-logs:
416	    desc: Verwijder logbestanden
417	    cmds:
418	      - |
419	        rm -rf "{{.LOGS_DIR}}" 2>/dev/null || true
420	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Logs opgeruimd\n"
421	
422	  backup-config:
423	    desc: Backup configuratiebestanden
424	    cmds:
425	      - |
426	        BACKUP_DIR=".task/backups/$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)"
427	        mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"
428	        for f in package.json tsconfig.json next.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc port.config.json docker-compose.yml; do
429	          [ -f "$f" ] && cp "$f" "$BACKUP_DIR/"
430	        done
431	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Backup opgeslagen in %s\n" "$BACKUP_DIR"
432	
433	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
434	  # DOCKER
435	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
436	  docker-build:
437	    desc: Build Docker image
438	    silent: false
439	    preconditions:
440	      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
441	        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
442	      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
443	        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
444	    cmds:
445	      - docker compose build
446	
447	  docker-up:
448	    desc: Start Docker containers
449	    silent: false
450	    preconditions:
451	      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
452	        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
453	      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
454	        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
455	    cmds:
456	      - docker compose up -d
457	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Docker containers gestart\n"
458	      - task: _show-endpoints
459	        vars:
460	          LABEL: docker
461	          PORT: '{{.DOCKER_PORT}}'
462	          SCHEME: '{{.DOCKER_SCHEME}}'
463	
464	  docker-down:
465	    desc: Stop Docker containers
466	    silent: false
467	    preconditions:
468	      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
469	        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
470	      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
471	        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
472	    cmds:
473	      - docker compose down
474	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Docker containers gestopt\n"
475	
476	  docker-logs:
477	    desc: Volg Docker logs
478	    preconditions:
479	      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
480	        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
481	      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
482	        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
483	    cmds:
484	      - docker compose logs -f {{.DOCKER_SERVICE}}
485	
486	  docker-rebuild:
487	    desc: Rebuild en herstart Docker containers
488	    silent: false
489	    preconditions:
490	      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
491	        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
492	      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
493	        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
494	    cmds:
495	      - docker compose down
496	      - docker compose build --no-cache
497	      - docker compose up -d
498	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Docker containers herbouwd en gestart\n"
499	      - task: _show-endpoints
500	        vars:
501	          LABEL: docker
502	          PORT: '{{.DOCKER_PORT}}'
503	          SCHEME: '{{.DOCKER_SCHEME}}'
504	
505	  docker-shell:
506	    desc: Open shell in Docker container
507	    preconditions:
508	      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
509	        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
510	      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
511	        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
512	    cmds:
513	      - docker compose exec {{.DOCKER_SERVICE}} sh
514	
515	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
516	  # INTERNAL
517	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
518	  _build-check:
519	    internal: true
520	    silent: false
521	    cmds:
522	      - |
523	        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Probeer build...\n"
524	        if pnpm run build; then
525	          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Build geslaagd\n"
526	        else
527	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Build mislukt — dit blokkeert dev-setup niet, maar check de errors\n"
528	        fi
529	
530	  _bootstrap-env:
531	    internal: true
532	    silent: false
533	    cmds:
534	      - |
535	        if [ -f ".env.local" ] || [ -f ".env" ]; then
536	          exit 0
537	        fi
538	
539	        if [ -f ".env.example" ]; then
540	          cp .env.example .env.local
541	          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m .env.local aangemaakt vanuit .env.example\n"
542	          exit 0
543	        fi
544	
545	        if [ -f ".env.local.example" ]; then
546	          cp .env.local.example .env.local
547	          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m .env.local aangemaakt vanuit .env.local.example\n"
548	          exit 0
549	        fi
550	
551	        printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen .env/.env.local en geen env-template gevonden; sla env-bootstrap over\n"
552	
553	  _ensure-ready:
554	    internal: true
555	    silent: false
556	    cmds:
557	      - task: _ensure-dirs
558	      - |
559	        _has() { command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; }
560	
561	        MISSING=""
562	        _has node || MISSING="$MISSING node"
563	        _has pnpm || MISSING="$MISSING pnpm"
564	
565	        if [ -n "$MISSING" ]; then
566	          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Ontbrekende tools:%s\n" "$MISSING"
567	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Installeer de ontbrekende tooling en run daarna 'task setup'\n"
568	          exit 1
569	        fi
570	
571	        NEED_SETUP=0
572	        REASONS=""
573	
574	        if [ ! -d "node_modules" ] || [ ! -f "node_modules/.modules.yaml" ]; then
575	          NEED_SETUP=1
576	          REASONS="$REASONS dependencies"
577	        fi
578	
579	        if [ -f "node_modules/.modules.yaml" ] && [ -f "package.json" ] && [ "package.json" -nt "node_modules/.modules.yaml" ]; then
580	          NEED_SETUP=1
581	          REASONS="$REASONS package.json"
582	        fi
583	
584	        if [ -f "node_modules/.modules.yaml" ] && [ -f "pnpm-lock.yaml" ] && [ "pnpm-lock.yaml" -nt "node_modules/.modules.yaml" ]; then
585	          NEED_SETUP=1
586	          REASONS="$REASONS pnpm-lock.yaml"
587	        fi
588	
589	        if [ ! -f ".env" ] && [ ! -f ".env.local" ] && { [ -f ".env.example" ] || [ -f ".env.local.example" ]; }; then
590	          NEED_SETUP=1
591	          REASONS="$REASONS env"
592	        fi
593	
594	        if [ "$NEED_SETUP" = "1" ]; then
595	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Onvolledige setup gedetecteerd:%s\n" "$REASONS"
596	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Voer automatisch 'task setup' uit...\n"
597	          task setup
598	        fi
599	
600	  _ensure-dirs:
601	    internal: true
602	    cmds:
603	      - mkdir -p "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}" "{{.LOGS_DIR}}"
604	    status:
605	      - test -d "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}"
606	      - test -d "{{.LOGS_DIR}}"
607	
608	  _kill-mode:
609	    # Stopt een bestaande service volledig voor een herstart:
610	    # 1. PID-bestand
611	    # 2. fuser op de poort als laatste noodstop
612	    internal: true
613	    vars:
614	      TARGET_PORT: '{{default "0" .TARGET_PORT}}'
615	      PID_FILE: '{{default "" .PID_FILE}}'
616	    cmds:
617	      - |
618	        _stop_timeout="{{.STOP_TIMEOUT}}"
619	        _pidfile="{{.PID_FILE}}"
620	        _port="{{.TARGET_PORT}}"
621	        # Stop via PID
622	        if [ -f "$_pidfile" ]; then
623	          PID=$(head -1 "$_pidfile" 2>/dev/null)
624	          if /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null; then
625	            /bin/kill -TERM "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
626	            W=0
627	            while /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && [ "$W" -lt "$_stop_timeout" ]; do
628	              sleep 1; W=$((W+1))
629	            done
630	            /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && /bin/kill -KILL "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
631	          fi
632	          rm -f "$_pidfile"
633	        fi
634	        # Noodstop: kill alles op de poort (orphan-processen)
635	        if [ "$_port" != "0" ] && fuser "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
636	          fuser -k "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
637	          sleep 1
638	          fuser "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 && fuser -k -KILL "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
639	        fi
640	
641	  _stop-port:
642	    internal: true
643	    vars:
644	      TARGET_PORT: '{{default "0" .TARGET_PORT}}'
645	    cmds:
646	      - |
647	        if fuser {{.TARGET_PORT}}/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
648	          fuser -k {{.TARGET_PORT}}/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
649	          sleep 1
650	          fuser {{.TARGET_PORT}}/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 && fuser -k -KILL {{.TARGET_PORT}}/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
651	        fi
652	
653	  _wait-for-endpoint:
654	    internal: true
655	    silent: false
656	    vars:
657	      LABEL: '{{default "service" .LABEL}}'
658	      PORT: '{{default "0" .PORT}}'
659	      SCHEME: '{{default "http" .SCHEME}}'
660	      HOST: '{{default "127.0.0.1" .HOST}}'
661	      LOG_FILE: '{{default "" .LOG_FILE}}'
662	    cmds:
663	      - |
664	        URL="{{.SCHEME}}://{{.HOST}}:{{.PORT}}/"
665	        CURL_EXTRA=""
666	        if [ "{{.SCHEME}}" = "https" ]; then
667	          CURL_EXTRA="-k"
668	        fi
669	        ELAPSED=0
670	        READY=0
671	
672	        while [ "$ELAPSED" -lt "{{.START_TIMEOUT}}" ]; do
673	          if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
674	            CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "$URL" 2>/dev/null || true)"
675	            if [ -n "$CODE" ] && [ "$CODE" != "000" ]; then
676	              READY=1
677	              break
678	            fi
679	          elif command -v fuser >/dev/null 2>&1; then
680	            if fuser "{{.PORT}}"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
681	              READY=1
682	              break
683	            fi
684	          fi
685	
686	          sleep 1
687	          ELAPSED=$((ELAPSED + 1))
688	        done
689	
690	        if [ "$READY" != "1" ]; then
691	          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Start mislukt — {{.LABEL}} endpoint %s reageert niet na {{.START_TIMEOUT}}s\n" "$URL"
692	          [ -n "{{.LOG_FILE}}" ] && tail -n 20 "{{.LOG_FILE}}" 2>/dev/null || true
693	          exit 1
694	        fi
695	
696	  _show-endpoints:
697	    internal: true
698	    silent: false
699	    cmds:
700	      - |
701	        LABEL="{{.LABEL}}"
702	        PORT="{{.PORT}}"
703	        SCHEME="{{default "http" .SCHEME}}"
704	        LOCAL_HOST="127.0.0.1"
705	        if [ -n "$LABEL" ]; then
706	          printf "\033[1;36m=== %s endpoints ===\033[0m\n" "$LABEL"
707	        fi
708	        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m local url: %s://localhost:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$PORT"
709	
710	        VPN_IP=""
711	        VPN_IF=""
712	        if command -v nmcli >/dev/null 2>&1; then
713	          VPN_IF="$(nmcli -t -f DEVICE,TYPE,STATE device status 2>/dev/null | awk -F: '$3 ~ /^connected/ && $2 ~ /^(wireguard|vpn|tun|tap)$/ {print $1; exit}')"
714	          if [ -n "$VPN_IF" ] && command -v ip >/dev/null 2>&1; then
715	            VPN_IP="$(ip -o -4 addr show dev "$VPN_IF" scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $4; exit}')"
716	            VPN_IP="${VPN_IP%/*}"
717	          fi
718	        fi
719	
720	        if command -v ip >/dev/null 2>&1; then
721	          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ]; then
722	            VPN_LINE="$(ip -o -4 addr show up scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '$2 ~ /^(tun|tap|wg|tailscale|ppp|utun|zt|vpn)/ {print $2, $4; exit}')"
723	          fi
724	          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ] && [ -z "$VPN_LINE" ]; then
725	            VPN_LINE="$(ip -o -4 addr show up scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '$2 !~ /^(lo|docker0|br-|veth|virbr|en|eth|wl|wwan)/ && $4 ~ /^(10\\.|172\\.(1[6-9]|2[0-9]|3[0-1])\\.|192\\.168\\.)/ {print $2, $4; exit}')"
726	          fi
727	          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ] && [ -z "$VPN_LINE" ]; then
728	            VPN_LINE="$(ip -o -4 addr show up scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '$4 ~ /^10\\.0\\.0\\./ {print $2, $4; exit}')"
729	          fi
730	          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ] && [ -n "$VPN_LINE" ]; then
731	            set -- $VPN_LINE
732	            VPN_IF="${VPN_IF:-$1}"
733	            VPN_IP="${2%/*}"
734	          fi
735	        fi
736	
737	        if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
738	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn ip:    %s\n" "$VPN_IP"
739	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn iface: %s\n" "${VPN_IF:-niet beschikbaar}"
740	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn url:   %s://%s:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$VPN_IP" "$PORT"
741	        else
742	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn ip:    niet beschikbaar\n"
743	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn iface: niet beschikbaar\n"
744	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn url:   niet beschikbaar\n"
745	        fi
746	
747	        if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
748	          CURL_EXTRA=""
749	          if [ "$SCHEME" = "https" ]; then
750	            CURL_EXTRA="-k"
751	          fi
752	
753	          LOCAL_CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "${SCHEME}://${LOCAL_HOST}:${PORT}/" 2>/dev/null || true)"
754	          if [ -n "$LOCAL_CODE" ] && [ "$LOCAL_CODE" != "000" ]; then
755	            printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m local endpoint reageert (%s)\n" "$LOCAL_CODE"
756	          else
757	            printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m local endpoint reageert niet via %s://%s:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$LOCAL_HOST" "$PORT"
758	          fi
759	
760	          if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
761	            VPN_CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "${SCHEME}://${VPN_IP}:${PORT}/" 2>/dev/null || true)"
762	            if [ -n "$VPN_CODE" ] && [ "$VPN_CODE" != "000" ]; then
763	              printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m vpn endpoint reageert (%s)\n" "$VPN_CODE"
764	            else
765	              printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m vpn endpoint reageert niet via %s://%s:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$VPN_IP" "$PORT"
766	            fi
767	          fi
768	        fi
769	
770	        if [ "$SCHEME" = "https" ] && [ -n "$VPN_IP" ] && [ -f "{{.DEV_CERT_FILE}}" ] && command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
771	          if ! openssl x509 -in "{{.DEV_CERT_FILE}}" -noout -ext subjectAltName 2>/dev/null | grep -Fq "IP Address:${VPN_IP}"; then
772	            printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m HTTPS certificaat bevat %s niet; browser kan een certificaatwaarschuwing tonen op het vpn-adres\n" "$VPN_IP"
773	          fi
774	        fi
775

file.content:
# taskfiles/core.yml — nextjs_frontend-gdriverights
# Generieke infra-laag: setup, lifecycle, logs, clean, docker
version: '3'
silent: true

vars:
  # ── Project identity ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  APP_NAME: nextjs_frontend-gdriverights

  # ── Tooling ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  PKG_MANAGER: pnpm
  INSTALL_CMD: pnpm install
  DEV_HOST: 0.0.0.0
  PROD_HOST: 0.0.0.0
  DEV_CMD: 'pnpm exec next dev --turbopack --hostname {{.DEV_HOST}} --port {{.DEV_PORT}}'
  PROD_CMD: 'pnpm exec next start --hostname {{.PROD_HOST}} --port {{.PROD_PORT}}'
  DEV_CERT_FILE: certificates/localhost.pem
  DEV_KEY_FILE: certificates/localhost-key.pem

  # ── Runtime paden ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  RUNTIME_DIR: .taskrun
  LOGS_DIR: .taskrun/logs
  DEV_LOG: .taskrun/logs/dev.log
  PROD_LOG: .taskrun/logs/prod.log

  # ── Ports (uit port.config.json) ──────────────────────────────────────────
  DEV_PORT: '44007'
  PROD_PORT: '44008'
  DOCKER_PORT: '3000'
  DEV_SCHEME: https
  PROD_SCHEME: http
  DOCKER_SCHEME: http

  # ── Docker ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  DOCKER_SERVICE: app

  # ── Timeouts ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  START_TIMEOUT: '30'
  STOP_TIMEOUT: '15'

tasks:
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # HELP
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  help:
    desc: Toon overzicht van beschikbare commando's
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== {{.APP_NAME}} ===\033[0m\n"
        printf "\033[1mdev port:\033[0m  %s\n" "{{.DEV_PORT}}"
        printf "\033[1mprod port:\033[0m %s\n" "{{.PROD_PORT}}"
        printf "\n\033[1;33mLifecycle:\033[0m\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask setup\033[0m        bootstrap dependencies + health-check\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask setup-quick\033[0m  snelle setup (alleen install)\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask dev-setup\033[0m    volledige developer setup\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask start\033[0m        start development server\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask start-frontend\033[0m start frontend alias\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask start-prod\033[0m   start productie server\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask stop\033[0m         stop alle services\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask stop-frontend\033[0m stop frontend alias\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask restart\033[0m      herstart development server\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask restart-frontend\033[0m herstart frontend alias\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask status\033[0m       service status + endpoints\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask logs\033[0m         volg development logs\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask logs-frontend\033[0m volg frontend logs alias\n"
        printf "\n\033[1;33mProject:\033[0m\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask build\033[0m          build voor productie\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask test\033[0m           run tests (jest)\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask test:watch\033[0m     tests in watch mode\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask test:coverage\033[0m  tests met coverage\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask test:e2e\033[0m       end-to-end tests (Playwright)\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask lint\033[0m           lint code\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask lint:fix\033[0m       auto-fix lint issues\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask format\033[0m         format code (prettier)\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask format:check\033[0m   check formatting\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask type-check\033[0m     TypeScript type-check\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask check\033[0m          lint + type-check + format-check\n"
        printf "\n\033[1;33mMaintenance:\033[0m\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask clean\033[0m        verwijder build-artefacten\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask clean:cache\033[0m  verwijder caches\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask clean:all\033[0m    verwijder alles (node_modules + artefacten)\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask clean:logs\033[0m   verwijder logbestanden\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask uninstall\033[0m    verwijder node_modules en caches\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask backup-config\033[0m backup configuratiebestanden\n"
        printf "\n\033[1;33mDocker:\033[0m\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:build\033[0m   build Docker image\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:up\033[0m      start containers\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:down\033[0m    stop containers\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:logs\033[0m    volg Docker logs\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:rebuild\033[0m rebuild + herstart\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:shell\033[0m   shell in container\n"
        printf "\n"

  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # SETUP
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  setup:
    desc: Install dependencies + env bootstrap + health-check
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: _ensure-dirs
      - task: install
      - task: _bootstrap-env
      - task: doctor
      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Setup voltooid\n"

  setup-quick:
    desc: Snelle setup (install + env bootstrap indien mogelijk)
    cmds:
      - task: install
      - task: _bootstrap-env
      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Quick setup voltooid\n"

  dev-setup:
    desc: Volledige developer setup (install + env bootstrap + doctor + build)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: _ensure-dirs
      - task: install
      - task: _bootstrap-env
      - task: doctor
      - task: _build-check
      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Developer setup voltooid\n"

  install:
    desc: Install dependencies
    cmds:
      - '{{.INSTALL_CMD}}'

  uninstall:
    desc: Verwijder node_modules en caches
    cmds:
      - |
        rm -rf node_modules .next .turbo 2>/dev/null || true
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m node_modules en caches verwijderd\n"

  doctor:
    desc: Health-check (vereiste tools aanwezig?)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        _has() { command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; }
        MISSING=""
        WARN=""
        _has task   || MISSING="$MISSING task"
        _has node   || MISSING="$MISSING node"
        _has pnpm   || MISSING="$MISSING pnpm"
        _has docker || WARN="$WARN docker"
        # fnm: check PATH en bekende installatiepaden
        if _has fnm; then
          FNM_V=$(fnm --version 2>/dev/null)
        elif [ -x "$HOME/.local/share/fnm/fnm" ]; then
          FNM_V=$("$HOME/.local/share/fnm/fnm" --version 2>/dev/null)
          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m fnm gevonden in ~/.local/share/fnm/ maar niet in PATH\n"
        else
          WARN="$WARN fnm"
        fi
        if [ -n "$MISSING" ]; then
          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Ontbrekende tools:%s\n" "$MISSING"
          exit 1
        fi
        [ -n "$WARN" ] && printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Optionele tools niet gevonden:%s\n" "$WARN"
        NODE_V=$(node -v 2>/dev/null)
        PNPM_V=$(pnpm -v 2>/dev/null)
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Vereiste tools aanwezig (node %s, pnpm %s" "$NODE_V" "$PNPM_V"
        [ -n "$FNM_V" ] && printf ", %s" "$FNM_V"
        printf ")\n"

  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # LIFECYCLE
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  start:
    desc: Start development server
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: _ensure-ready
      - task: _ensure-dirs
      - task: _kill-mode
        vars:
          TARGET_PORT: '{{.DEV_PORT}}'
          PID_FILE: '{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/dev.pid'
      - |
        DEV_CMD='{{.DEV_CMD}}'
        if [ -f "{{.DEV_CERT_FILE}}" ] && [ -f "{{.DEV_KEY_FILE}}" ]; then
          DEV_CMD="$DEV_CMD --experimental-https --experimental-https-cert {{.DEV_CERT_FILE}} --experimental-https-key {{.DEV_KEY_FILE}}"
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Gebruik bestaand HTTPS certificaat uit {{.DEV_CERT_FILE}} en {{.DEV_KEY_FILE}}\n"
        else
          DEV_CMD="$DEV_CMD --experimental-https"
          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen lokaal HTTPS certificaat gevonden; eerste run kan een sudo-prompt geven voor certificaatgeneratie\n"
        fi
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Starting {{.APP_NAME}} op poort {{.DEV_PORT}}...\n"
        : > "{{.DEV_LOG}}"
        if command -v setsid >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          nohup setsid bash -lc "$DEV_CMD" >> "{{.DEV_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
        else
          nohup bash -lc "$DEV_CMD" >> "{{.DEV_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
        fi
      - task: _wait-for-endpoint
        vars:
          LABEL: development
          PORT: '{{.DEV_PORT}}'
          SCHEME: '{{.DEV_SCHEME}}'
          HOST: 127.0.0.1
          LOG_FILE: '{{.DEV_LOG}}'
      - |
        REAL_PID=$(fuser "{{.DEV_PORT}}"/tcp 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')
        if [ -z "$REAL_PID" ]; then
          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Development server reageert, maar PID kon niet bepaald worden op poort {{.DEV_PORT}}\n"
          exit 1
        fi
        echo "$REAL_PID" > "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/dev.pid"
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Development server draait op {{.DEV_SCHEME}}://localhost:{{.DEV_PORT}} (PID %s)\n" "$REAL_PID"
      - task: _show-endpoints
        vars:
          LABEL: development
          PORT: '{{.DEV_PORT}}'
          SCHEME: '{{.DEV_SCHEME}}'

  start-prod:
    desc: Start productie server (vereist build)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: _ensure-ready
      - task: _ensure-dirs
      - task: _kill-mode
        vars:
          TARGET_PORT: '{{.PROD_PORT}}'
          PID_FILE: '{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/prod.pid'
      - |
        if [ ! -d ".next" ]; then
          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen build gevonden, eerst builden...\n"
          pnpm run build
        fi
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Starting {{.APP_NAME}} (prod) op poort {{.PROD_PORT}}...\n"
        : > "{{.PROD_LOG}}"
        if command -v setsid >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          nohup setsid bash -lc "{{.PROD_CMD}}" >> "{{.PROD_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
        else
          nohup bash -lc "{{.PROD_CMD}}" >> "{{.PROD_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
        fi
      - task: _wait-for-endpoint
        vars:
          LABEL: production
          PORT: '{{.PROD_PORT}}'
          SCHEME: '{{.PROD_SCHEME}}'
          HOST: 127.0.0.1
          LOG_FILE: '{{.PROD_LOG}}'
      - |
        REAL_PID=$(fuser "{{.PROD_PORT}}"/tcp 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')
        if [ -z "$REAL_PID" ]; then
          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Productie server reageert, maar PID kon niet bepaald worden op poort {{.PROD_PORT}}\n"
          exit 1
        fi
        echo "$REAL_PID" > "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/prod.pid"
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Productie server draait op {{.PROD_SCHEME}}://localhost:{{.PROD_PORT}} (PID %s)\n" "$REAL_PID"
      - task: _show-endpoints
        vars:
          LABEL: production
          PORT: '{{.PROD_PORT}}'
          SCHEME: '{{.PROD_SCHEME}}'

  stop:
    desc: Stop alle services
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        STOPPED=0
        for NAME in dev prod; do
          if [ "$NAME" = "dev" ]; then PORT="{{.DEV_PORT}}"; else PORT="{{.PROD_PORT}}"; fi
          PIDFILE="{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/${NAME}.pid"
          # Stop via PID-bestand
          if [ -f "$PIDFILE" ]; then
            PID=$(head -1 "$PIDFILE" 2>/dev/null)
            if /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null; then
              /bin/kill -TERM "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
              WAITED=0
              while /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && [ "$WAITED" -lt "{{.STOP_TIMEOUT}}" ]; do
                sleep 1; WAITED=$((WAITED + 1))
              done
              /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && /bin/kill -KILL "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
              printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m %s gestopt (PID %s)\n" "$NAME" "$PID"
              STOPPED=1
            fi
            rm -f "$PIDFILE"
          fi
          # Laatste fallback: kill alles op de poort (pnpm kan orphan-processen achterlaten)
          if fuser "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            fuser -k "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
            sleep 1
            fuser "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 && fuser -k -KILL "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
            printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m %s gestopt via poort %s (orphan cleanup)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT"
            STOPPED=1
          fi
        done
        if [ "$STOPPED" = "0" ]; then
          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen draaiende services gevonden\n"
        fi

  restart:
    desc: Herstart development server
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: stop
      - |
        sleep 1
      - task: start

  status:
    desc: Service status
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        _port_online() {
          local P="$1"
          local S="$2"
          local CURL_EXTRA=""
          if [ "$S" = "https" ]; then
            CURL_EXTRA="-k"
          fi
          if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "${S}://127.0.0.1:${P}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
            if [ "$CODE" != "000" ]; then
              return 0
            fi
          fi
          if command -v fuser >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            if fuser "$P"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
              return 0
            fi
          fi
          return 1
        }
        printf "\033[1;36m=== Service status ===\033[0m\n"
        for NAME in dev prod; do
          if [ "$NAME" = "dev" ]; then PORT="{{.DEV_PORT}}"; SCHEME="{{.DEV_SCHEME}}"; else PORT="{{.PROD_PORT}}"; SCHEME="{{.PROD_SCHEME}}"; fi
          PIDFILE="{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/${NAME}.pid"
          PID=""
          if [ -f "$PIDFILE" ]; then
            PID=$(head -1 "$PIDFILE" 2>/dev/null || true)
          fi
          PID_RUNNING=0
          if [ -n "$PID" ]; then
            /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && PID_RUNNING=1
          fi
          if _port_online "$PORT" "$SCHEME"; then
            if [ "$PID_RUNNING" = "1" ]; then
              printf "\033[32m[RUNNING]\033[0m  %s  (poort %s, PID %s)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT" "$PID"
            else
              printf "\033[33m[RUNNING]\033[0m  %s  (poort %s, niet via task gestart)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT"
            fi
          elif [ "$PID_RUNNING" = "1" ]; then
            printf "\033[33m[STARTING]\033[0m %s  (proces actief, poort %s nog niet online)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT"
          else
            if [ -n "$PID" ]; then
              rm -f "$PIDFILE" 2>/dev/null || true
            fi
            printf "\033[31m[STOPPED]\033[0m  %s\n" "$NAME"
          fi
        done
      - task: _show-endpoints
        vars:
          LABEL: development
          PORT: '{{.DEV_PORT}}'
          SCHEME: '{{.DEV_SCHEME}}'
      - task: _show-endpoints
        vars:
          LABEL: production
          PORT: '{{.PROD_PORT}}'
          SCHEME: '{{.PROD_SCHEME}}'

  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # LOGS
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  logs:
    desc: Volg development logs
    cmds:
      - |
        test -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}" || { printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen logbestand gevonden ({{.DEV_LOG}})\n"; exit 0; }
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Volgen van {{.DEV_LOG}} (Ctrl+C om te stoppen)\n"
        tail -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}"

  logs-tail:
    desc: Laatste 50 regels + follow
    cmds:
      - |
        test -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}" || { printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen logbestand gevonden\n"; exit 0; }
        tail -n 50 -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}"

  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # MAINTENANCE
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  clean:
    desc: Verwijder build-artefacten
    cmds:
      - |
        rm -rf .next dist build out coverage 2>/dev/null || true
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Build-artefacten opgeruimd\n"

  clean-cache:
    desc: Verwijder caches (.next, .turbo)
    cmds:
      - |
        rm -rf .next .turbo 2>/dev/null || true
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Caches opgeruimd\n"

  clean-all:
    desc: Verwijder alles (node_modules + build-artefacten + caches)
    cmds:
      - |
        rm -rf node_modules .next dist build out coverage .turbo 2>/dev/null || true
        rm -rf "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}" 2>/dev/null || true
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Alles opgeruimd\n"

  clean-logs:
    desc: Verwijder logbestanden
    cmds:
      - |
        rm -rf "{{.LOGS_DIR}}" 2>/dev/null || true
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Logs opgeruimd\n"

  backup-config:
    desc: Backup configuratiebestanden
    cmds:
      - |
        BACKUP_DIR=".task/backups/$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)"
        mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"
        for f in package.json tsconfig.json next.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc port.config.json docker-compose.yml; do
          [ -f "$f" ] && cp "$f" "$BACKUP_DIR/"
        done
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Backup opgeslagen in %s\n" "$BACKUP_DIR"

  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # DOCKER
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  docker-build:
    desc: Build Docker image
    silent: false
    preconditions:
      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
    cmds:
      - docker compose build

  docker-up:
    desc: Start Docker containers
    silent: false
    preconditions:
      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
    cmds:
      - docker compose up -d
      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Docker containers gestart\n"
      - task: _show-endpoints
        vars:
          LABEL: docker
          PORT: '{{.DOCKER_PORT}}'
          SCHEME: '{{.DOCKER_SCHEME}}'

  docker-down:
    desc: Stop Docker containers
    silent: false
    preconditions:
      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
    cmds:
      - docker compose down
      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Docker containers gestopt\n"

  docker-logs:
    desc: Volg Docker logs
    preconditions:
      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
    cmds:
      - docker compose logs -f {{.DOCKER_SERVICE}}

  docker-rebuild:
    desc: Rebuild en herstart Docker containers
    silent: false
    preconditions:
      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
    cmds:
      - docker compose down
      - docker compose build --no-cache
      - docker compose up -d
      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Docker containers herbouwd en gestart\n"
      - task: _show-endpoints
        vars:
          LABEL: docker
          PORT: '{{.DOCKER_PORT}}'
          SCHEME: '{{.DOCKER_SCHEME}}'

  docker-shell:
    desc: Open shell in Docker container
    preconditions:
      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
    cmds:
      - docker compose exec {{.DOCKER_SERVICE}} sh

  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # INTERNAL
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  _build-check:
    internal: true
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Probeer build...\n"
        if pnpm run build; then
          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Build geslaagd\n"
        else
          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Build mislukt — dit blokkeert dev-setup niet, maar check de errors\n"
        fi

  _bootstrap-env:
    internal: true
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        if [ -f ".env.local" ] || [ -f ".env" ]; then
          exit 0
        fi

        if [ -f ".env.example" ]; then
          cp .env.example .env.local
          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m .env.local aangemaakt vanuit .env.example\n"
          exit 0
        fi

        if [ -f ".env.local.example" ]; then
          cp .env.local.example .env.local
          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m .env.local aangemaakt vanuit .env.local.example\n"
          exit 0
        fi

        printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen .env/.env.local en geen env-template gevonden; sla env-bootstrap over\n"

  _ensure-ready:
    internal: true
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: _ensure-dirs
      - |
        _has() { command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; }

        MISSING=""
        _has node || MISSING="$MISSING node"
        _has pnpm || MISSING="$MISSING pnpm"

        if [ -n "$MISSING" ]; then
          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Ontbrekende tools:%s\n" "$MISSING"
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Installeer de ontbrekende tooling en run daarna 'task setup'\n"
          exit 1
        fi

        NEED_SETUP=0
        REASONS=""

        if [ ! -d "node_modules" ] || [ ! -f "node_modules/.modules.yaml" ]; then
          NEED_SETUP=1
          REASONS="$REASONS dependencies"
        fi

        if [ -f "node_modules/.modules.yaml" ] && [ -f "package.json" ] && [ "package.json" -nt "node_modules/.modules.yaml" ]; then
          NEED_SETUP=1
          REASONS="$REASONS package.json"
        fi

        if [ -f "node_modules/.modules.yaml" ] && [ -f "pnpm-lock.yaml" ] && [ "pnpm-lock.yaml" -nt "node_modules/.modules.yaml" ]; then
          NEED_SETUP=1
          REASONS="$REASONS pnpm-lock.yaml"
        fi

        if [ ! -f ".env" ] && [ ! -f ".env.local" ] && { [ -f ".env.example" ] || [ -f ".env.local.example" ]; }; then
          NEED_SETUP=1
          REASONS="$REASONS env"
        fi

        if [ "$NEED_SETUP" = "1" ]; then
          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Onvolledige setup gedetecteerd:%s\n" "$REASONS"
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Voer automatisch 'task setup' uit...\n"
          task setup
        fi

  _ensure-dirs:
    internal: true
    cmds:
      - mkdir -p "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}" "{{.LOGS_DIR}}"
    status:
      - test -d "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}"
      - test -d "{{.LOGS_DIR}}"

  _kill-mode:
    # Stopt een bestaande service volledig voor een herstart:
    # 1. PID-bestand
    # 2. fuser op de poort als laatste noodstop
    internal: true
    vars:
      TARGET_PORT: '{{default "0" .TARGET_PORT}}'
      PID_FILE: '{{default "" .PID_FILE}}'
    cmds:
      - |
        _stop_timeout="{{.STOP_TIMEOUT}}"
        _pidfile="{{.PID_FILE}}"
        _port="{{.TARGET_PORT}}"
        # Stop via PID
        if [ -f "$_pidfile" ]; then
          PID=$(head -1 "$_pidfile" 2>/dev/null)
          if /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null; then
            /bin/kill -TERM "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
            W=0
            while /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && [ "$W" -lt "$_stop_timeout" ]; do
              sleep 1; W=$((W+1))
            done
            /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && /bin/kill -KILL "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
          fi
          rm -f "$_pidfile"
        fi
        # Noodstop: kill alles op de poort (orphan-processen)
        if [ "$_port" != "0" ] && fuser "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          fuser -k "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
          sleep 1
          fuser "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 && fuser -k -KILL "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
        fi

  _stop-port:
    internal: true
    vars:
      TARGET_PORT: '{{default "0" .TARGET_PORT}}'
    cmds:
      - |
        if fuser {{.TARGET_PORT}}/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          fuser -k {{.TARGET_PORT}}/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
          sleep 1
          fuser {{.TARGET_PORT}}/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 && fuser -k -KILL {{.TARGET_PORT}}/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
        fi

  _wait-for-endpoint:
    internal: true
    silent: false
    vars:
      LABEL: '{{default "service" .LABEL}}'
      PORT: '{{default "0" .PORT}}'
      SCHEME: '{{default "http" .SCHEME}}'
      HOST: '{{default "127.0.0.1" .HOST}}'
      LOG_FILE: '{{default "" .LOG_FILE}}'
    cmds:
      - |
        URL="{{.SCHEME}}://{{.HOST}}:{{.PORT}}/"
        CURL_EXTRA=""
        if [ "{{.SCHEME}}" = "https" ]; then
          CURL_EXTRA="-k"
        fi
        ELAPSED=0
        READY=0

        while [ "$ELAPSED" -lt "{{.START_TIMEOUT}}" ]; do
          if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "$URL" 2>/dev/null || true)"
            if [ -n "$CODE" ] && [ "$CODE" != "000" ]; then
              READY=1
              break
            fi
          elif command -v fuser >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            if fuser "{{.PORT}}"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
              READY=1
              break
            fi
          fi

          sleep 1
          ELAPSED=$((ELAPSED + 1))
        done

        if [ "$READY" != "1" ]; then
          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Start mislukt — {{.LABEL}} endpoint %s reageert niet na {{.START_TIMEOUT}}s\n" "$URL"
          [ -n "{{.LOG_FILE}}" ] && tail -n 20 "{{.LOG_FILE}}" 2>/dev/null || true
          exit 1
        fi

  _show-endpoints:
    internal: true
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        LABEL="{{.LABEL}}"
        PORT="{{.PORT}}"
        SCHEME="{{default "http" .SCHEME}}"
        LOCAL_HOST="127.0.0.1"
        if [ -n "$LABEL" ]; then
          printf "\033[1;36m=== %s endpoints ===\033[0m\n" "$LABEL"
        fi
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m local url: %s://localhost:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$PORT"

        VPN_IP=""
        VPN_IF=""
        if command -v nmcli >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          VPN_IF="$(nmcli -t -f DEVICE,TYPE,STATE device status 2>/dev/null | awk -F: '$3 ~ /^connected/ && $2 ~ /^(wireguard|vpn|tun|tap)$/ {print $1; exit}')"
          if [ -n "$VPN_IF" ] && command -v ip >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            VPN_IP="$(ip -o -4 addr show dev "$VPN_IF" scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $4; exit}')"
            VPN_IP="${VPN_IP%/*}"
          fi
        fi

        if command -v ip >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ]; then
            VPN_LINE="$(ip -o -4 addr show up scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '$2 ~ /^(tun|tap|wg|tailscale|ppp|utun|zt|vpn)/ {print $2, $4; exit}')"
          fi
          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ] && [ -z "$VPN_LINE" ]; then
            VPN_LINE="$(ip -o -4 addr show up scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '$2 !~ /^(lo|docker0|br-|veth|virbr|en|eth|wl|wwan)/ && $4 ~ /^(10\\.|172\\.(1[6-9]|2[0-9]|3[0-1])\\.|192\\.168\\.)/ {print $2, $4; exit}')"
          fi
          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ] && [ -z "$VPN_LINE" ]; then
            VPN_LINE="$(ip -o -4 addr show up scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '$4 ~ /^10\\.0\\.0\\./ {print $2, $4; exit}')"
          fi
          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ] && [ -n "$VPN_LINE" ]; then
            set -- $VPN_LINE
            VPN_IF="${VPN_IF:-$1}"
            VPN_IP="${2%/*}"
          fi
        fi

        if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn ip:    %s\n" "$VPN_IP"
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn iface: %s\n" "${VPN_IF:-niet beschikbaar}"
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn url:   %s://%s:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$VPN_IP" "$PORT"
        else
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn ip:    niet beschikbaar\n"
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn iface: niet beschikbaar\n"
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn url:   niet beschikbaar\n"
        fi

        if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          CURL_EXTRA=""
          if [ "$SCHEME" = "https" ]; then
            CURL_EXTRA="-k"
          fi

          LOCAL_CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "${SCHEME}://${LOCAL_HOST}:${PORT}/" 2>/dev/null || true)"
          if [ -n "$LOCAL_CODE" ] && [ "$LOCAL_CODE" != "000" ]; then
            printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m local endpoint reageert (%s)\n" "$LOCAL_CODE"
          else
            printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m local endpoint reageert niet via %s://%s:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$LOCAL_HOST" "$PORT"
          fi

          if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
            VPN_CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "${SCHEME}://${VPN_IP}:${PORT}/" 2>/dev/null || true)"
            if [ -n "$VPN_CODE" ] && [ "$VPN_CODE" != "000" ]; then
              printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m vpn endpoint reageert (%s)\n" "$VPN_CODE"
            else
              printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m vpn endpoint reageert niet via %s://%s:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$VPN_IP" "$PORT"
            fi
          fi
        fi

        if [ "$SCHEME" = "https" ] && [ -n "$VPN_IP" ] && [ -f "{{.DEV_CERT_FILE}}" ] && command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          if ! openssl x509 -in "{{.DEV_CERT_FILE}}" -noout -ext subjectAltName 2>/dev/null | grep -Fq "IP Address:${VPN_IP}"; then
            printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m HTTPS certificaat bevat %s niet; browser kan een certificaatwaarschuwing tonen op het vpn-adres\n" "$VPN_IP"
          fi
        fi

lastPrompt: Het moeilijke is: Ik zou de meest geavanceerde Taskfile.yml als basis willen houden, maar ik weet niet meer welke dat is ...

content.text: Nu de root Taskfile.yml en project.yml van deze canonieke setup:

content.content:
1	# Taskfile.yml — nextjs_frontend-gdriverights
2	# Structuur:
3	#   Taskfile.yml            root — lifecycle wrappers + help
4	#   taskfiles/core.yml      generieke infra: setup, doctor, clean, logs
5	#   taskfiles/project.yml   projectspecifiek: build, lint, test, format
6	version: '3'
7	silent: true
8	dotenv: ['.env', '.env.local']
9	
10	includes:
11	  core:
12	    taskfile: ./taskfiles/core.yml
13	    optional: false
14	  project:
15	    taskfile: ./taskfiles/project.yml
16	    optional: false
17	
18	# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
19	# Lifecycle wrappers — delegeert naar core + project
20	# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
21	tasks:
22	  default:
23	    desc: Toon help
24	    silent: false
25	    cmds: [task: core:help]
26	
27	  help:
28	    desc: Toon beschikbare commando's
29	    silent: false
30	    cmds: [task: core:help]
31	
32	  install:
33	    desc: Install dependencies
34	    cmds: [task: core:install]
35	
36	  setup:
37	    desc: Bootstrap dependencies + health-check
38	    cmds: [task: core:setup]
39	
40	  setup-quick:
41	    desc: Snelle setup (alleen install)
42	    cmds: [task: core:setup-quick]

# Taskfile.yml — nextjs_frontend-gdriverights
# Structuur:
#   Taskfile.yml            root — lifecycle wrappers + help
#   taskfiles/core.yml      generieke infra: setup, doctor, clean, logs
#   taskfiles/project.yml   projectspecifiek: build, lint, test, format
version: '3'
silent: true
dotenv: ['.env', '.env.local']

includes:
  core:
    taskfile: ./taskfiles/core.yml
    optional: false
  project:
    taskfile: ./taskfiles/project.yml
    optional: false

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Lifecycle wrappers — delegeert naar core + project
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
tasks:
  default:
    desc: Toon help
    silent: false
    cmds: [task: core:help]

  help:
    desc: Toon beschikbare commando's
    silent: false
    cmds: [task: core:help]

  install:
    desc: Install dependencies
    cmds: [task: core:install]

  setup:
    desc: Bootstrap dependencies + health-check
    cmds: [task: core:setup]

  setup-quick:
    desc: Snelle setup (alleen install)
    cmds: [task: core:setup-quick]

  dev-setup:
    desc: Volledige developer setup
    cmds: [task: core:dev-setup]

  doctor:
    desc: Health-check (vereiste tools aanwezig?)
    cmds: [task: core:doctor]

  uninstall:
    desc: Verwijder node_modules en caches
    cmds: [task: core:uninstall]

  start:
    desc: Start development server
    cmds: [task: core:start]

  start-frontend:
    desc: Start frontend development server
    cmds: [task: core:start]

  start-prod:
    desc: Start productie server
    cmds: [task: core:start-prod]

  stop:
    desc: Stop alle services
    cmds: [task: core:stop]

  stop-frontend:
    desc: Stop frontend services
    cmds: [task: core:stop]

  restart:
    desc: Herstart development server
    cmds: [task: core:restart]

  restart-frontend:
    desc: Herstart frontend development server
    cmds: [task: core:restart]

  serve:
    desc: Alias voor start
    cmds: [task: core:start]

  status:
    desc: Service status
    cmds: [task: core:status]

  logs:
    desc: Volg development logs
    cmds: [task: core:logs]

  logs-frontend:
    desc: Volg frontend development logs
    cmds: [task: core:logs]

  logs:tail:
    desc: Volg logs (laatste 50 regels + follow)
    cmds: [task: core:logs-tail]

  clean:
    desc: Verwijder build-artefacten
    cmds: [task: core:clean]

  clean:cache:
    desc: Verwijder caches (.next, .turbo)
    cmds: [task: core:clean-cache]

  clean:all:
    desc: Verwijder alles (node_modules + artefacten)
    cmds: [task: core:clean-all]

  clean:full:
    desc: Alias voor clean:all
    cmds: [task: core:clean-all]

  clean:logs:
    desc: Verwijder logbestanden
    cmds: [task: core:clean-logs]

  backup-config:
    desc: Backup configuratiebestanden
    cmds: [task: core:backup-config]

  test:
    desc: Run tests
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:test

  lint:
    desc: Lint code
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:lint

  lint:fix:
    desc: Auto-fix lint issues
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:lint-fix

  format:
    desc: Format code met Prettier
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:format

  format:check:
    desc: Controleer formatting zonder wijzigingen
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:format-check

  type-check:
    desc: Voer TypeScript type-check uit
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:type-check

  check:
    desc: Draai lint, type-check en format-check
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:check

  test:coverage:
    desc: Run tests met coverage
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:test-coverage

  test:watch:
    desc: Run tests in watch mode
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:test-watch

  test:e2e:
    desc: Run end-to-end tests
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:test-e2e

  build:
    desc: Build voor productie
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:build

  # ── Docker ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  docker:build:
    desc: Build Docker image
    cmds: [task: core:docker-build]

  docker:up:
    desc: Start Docker containers
    cmds: [task: core:docker-up]

  docker:down:
    desc: Stop Docker containers
    cmds: [task: core:docker-down]

  docker:logs:
    desc: Volg Docker logs
    cmds: [task: core:docker-logs]

  docker:rebuild:
    desc: Rebuild en herstart Docker containers
    cmds: [task: core:docker-rebuild]

  docker:shell:
    desc: Open shell in Docker container
    cmds: [task: core:docker-shell]

file.content:
# taskfiles/project.yml — nextjs_frontend-gdriverights
# Projectspecifieke taken: build, lint, test, format
version: '3'
silent: true

vars:
  BUILD_CMD: pnpm run build
  TEST_CMD: pnpm run test
  TEST_WATCH_CMD: pnpm run test:watch
  TEST_COVERAGE_CMD: pnpm run test:coverage
  TEST_E2E_CMD: pnpm run test:e2e
  LINT_CMD: pnpm run lint
  LINT_FIX_CMD: pnpm run lint:fix
  FORMAT_CMD: pnpm run format
  FORMAT_CHECK_CMD: pnpm run format:check
  TYPE_CHECK_CMD: pnpm run type-check

tasks:
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # BUILD
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  build:
    desc: Build voor productie
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Building...\n"
      - '{{.BUILD_CMD}}'
      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Build voltooid\n"

  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # TESTING
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  test:
    desc: Run tests (jest)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - '{{.TEST_CMD}}'

  test-watch:
    desc: Run tests in watch mode
    cmds:
      - '{{.TEST_WATCH_CMD}}'

  test-coverage:
    desc: Run tests met coverage
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - '{{.TEST_COVERAGE_CMD}}'

  test-e2e:
    desc: Run end-to-end tests (Playwright)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - '{{.TEST_E2E_CMD}}'

  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # CODE QUALITY
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  lint:
    desc: Lint code
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - '{{.LINT_CMD}}'

  lint-fix:
    desc: Auto-fix lint issues
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - '{{.LINT_FIX_CMD}}'

  format:
    desc: Format code met Prettier
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - '{{.FORMAT_CMD}}'

  format-check:
    desc: Check formatting (geen wijzigingen)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - '{{.FORMAT_CHECK_CMD}}'

  type-check:
    desc: TypeScript type-check
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - '{{.TYPE_CHECK_CMD}}'

  check:
    desc: Lint + type-check + format-check
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: lint
      - task: type-check
      - task: format-check
      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Alle checks geslaagd\n"

set -euo pipefail
ROOT=/sessions/elegant-fervent-albattani/mnt/_verzameldeTaskfiles
SRC="$ROOT/linuxoptiplexvpn/nextjs_frontend-gdriverights"
DST="$ROOT/references/canonical"
mkdir -p "$DST/taskfiles"
cp "$SRC/Taskfile.yml" "$DST/Taskfile.yml"
cp "$SRC/taskfiles/core.yml" "$DST/taskfiles/core.yml"
cp "$SRC/taskfiles/project.yml" "$DST/taskfiles/project.yml"

# Secundaire patronen om uit te citeren
mkdir -p "$ROOT/references/patterns"
cp "$ROOT/linuxoptiplexvpn/_research_BingelAgendaLesFicheScraper/taskfiles/core.yml" \
   "$ROOT/references/patterns/core-multi-service.yml"
cp "$ROOT/linuxoptiplexvpn/bingelKuCuDoelenRapportering2026/taskfiles/core.yml" \
   "$ROOT/references/patterns/core-shared-server-safe.yml"
cp "$ROOT/linuxoptiplexvpn/clasp_kalendertoolv202601/taskfiles/core.yml" \
   "$ROOT/references/patterns/core-prod-pipeline.yml"

# Verifieer
ls -la "$DST" "$DST/taskfiles" "$ROOT/references/patterns"
wc -l "$DST/taskfiles/core.yml" "$DST/Taskfile.yml" "$DST/taskfiles/project.yml" \
      "$ROOT/references/patterns/"*.yml

content.text: Files staan klaar. Nu de README en update van de skill zodat hij naar deze concrete templates verwijst.

input.content:
# References — canonieke Taskfile templates voor de skill

Deze map bevat de daadwerkelijke gen-3 Taskfile-set die als basis dient voor de `taskfiles` skill.

---

## Welke is de meest geavanceerde?

**Winner:** `canonical/` — een 1-op-1 kopie van `linuxoptiplexvpn/nextjs_frontend-gdriverights/`.

**Waarom deze:**
- 774 regels in `taskfiles/core.yml` met alle 5 gen-3 building blocks
  (`_ensure-ready`, `_kill-mode`, `_wait-for-endpoint`, `_show-endpoints`, `_bootstrap-env`)
- HTTPS-aware lifecycle (uniek): `DEV_SCHEME`/`PROD_SCHEME`, dev cert auto-detect, openssl SAN-check
- Multi-laags VPN-detectie startend met `nmcli` (NetworkManager native) — vier fallback-niveaus
- Auto-setup-detection via mtime-vergelijking (`package.json`/`pnpm-lock.yaml` ↔ `node_modules/.modules.yaml`)
- `_wait-for-endpoint` als herbruikbare sub-task met `LABEL/PORT/SCHEME/HOST/LOG_FILE` parameters
- Drie setup-flavors: `setup`, `setup-quick`, `dev-setup`
- `setsid` proces-detach met fallback
- 17 vars, 8 internal building blocks

Dit is de evolutie ná de `linuxoptiplexpagaaiervpn` versie van dezelfde repo (575 regels) — die snapshot mist HTTPS-support, `_ensure-ready` en `_bootstrap-env`. Niet gebruiken.

---

## Structuur van `canonical/`

```
canonical/
├── Taskfile.yml                  thin facade — forwards naar core/project
├── taskfiles/
│   ├── core.yml                  774 regels — gen-3 lifecycle + docker + maintenance
│   └── project.yml               96 regels — build/test/lint/format/typecheck
```

**Gebruik in de skill:** bij modus NEW kopieert de skill deze drie files, vervangt
project-specifieke vars (APP_NAME, DEV_PORT, PROD_PORT, DEV_CMD, ...) en past
hardcoded paden aan (`certificates/localhost.pem`, `port.config.json` indien afwezig).

---

## Patroon-fragmenten (`patterns/`)

Drie specifieke patronen uit andere repo's die niet in `canonical/` zitten maar
in specifieke project-types overgenomen moeten worden. De skill citeert deze
files alleen voor het relevante stuk; ze zijn geen complete drop-in vervangers.

### `patterns/core-multi-service.yml` (651 regels)

Origineel: `linuxoptiplexvpn/_research_BingelAgendaLesFicheScraper/taskfiles/core.yml`.

**Wat overnemen wanneer:**

| Patroon | Toepassen wanneer | Regels in dit bestand |
|---|---|---|
| Aparte `FRONTEND_PID_FILE`/`BACKEND_PID_FILE`/`*_LOG_FILE` vars | Project heeft >1 langlopend service-proces | vars-blok bovenaan |
| `_stop:service` met `PID_FILE`/`PORT`/`LABEL` parameter | Same | rond regels 540-590 |
| **Process-group kill** (`PGID="$(ps -o pgid= -p "$PID" ...)"; pkill -TERM -g "$PGID"`) | Pnpm/python subprocessen die orphan-children laten | rond regels 567-575 |
| Compose-file autodetect via `vars: { sh: ... }` | i.p.v. `preconditions:` met OR-test | rond regels 84-91 |
| Calcport-integratie (poorten uit `ports.json`) | Alleen relevant als project calcport gebruikt | vars-blok |
| `db:backup` task (pg_dump met env-validatie) | Project met PostgreSQL | rond regels 600+ |

### `patterns/core-shared-server-safe.yml` (491 regels)

Origineel: `linuxoptiplexvpn/bingelKuCuDoelenRapportering2026/taskfiles/core.yml`.

**Wat overnemen wanneer:** project draait op een shared server waar meerdere
projecten dezelfde poorten of process-namen kunnen claimen.

**Het patroon:** `stop_if_owned` leest `/proc/$PID/cwd` en checkt of het proces
bij dít project hoort vóór killen. Dat voorkomt dat `task stop` per ongeluk
een ander project's server vermoordt op een gedeelde host.

### `patterns/core-prod-pipeline.yml` (351 regels)

Origineel: `linuxoptiplexvpn/clasp_kalendertoolv202601/taskfiles/core.yml`.

**Wat overnemen wanneer:** project heeft een **parallelle** prod-stack naast dev
(eigen ports, eigen PIDs, eigen logs). Komt vooral voor bij Clasp + backend
projecten, of Python + frontend hybriden.

**Patronen om over te nemen:**
- Aparte `PROD_BACKEND_PID/PGID/LOG`, `PROD_FRONTEND_*` vars
- Externe `./scripts/stop_service.sh` en `./scripts/status_service.sh`
  voor DRY tussen dev en prod (i.p.v. duplicate inline shell)
- `prod:rebuild` task voor productie-build + restart in één stap

---

## Customization-checklist bij hergebruik

Bij overnemen van `canonical/` voor een nieuw project, **altijd aanpassen:**

- [ ] `APP_NAME` — naar repo-naam
- [ ] `DEV_PORT`, `PROD_PORT`, `DOCKER_PORT` — naar projectspecifieke poorten
- [ ] `DEV_CMD`, `PROD_CMD` — naar correcte runner (next/vite/uvicorn/...)
- [ ] `INSTALL_CMD` / `PKG_MANAGER` — pnpm/uv/poetry
- [ ] `DEV_CERT_FILE`, `DEV_KEY_FILE` paden of weghalen als geen HTTPS-dev nodig
- [ ] `BACKUP_DIR` lijst van bestanden in `backup-config` task
- [ ] `DOCKER_SERVICE` naar service-naam in compose-file
- [ ] `RUNTIME_DIR` van `.taskrun` naar `.task` (de canonieke versie gebruikt
  `.taskrun` — pas aan naar de skill-default `.task` bij genereren)
- [ ] `dotenv` volgorde van `['.env', '.env.local']` naar `['.env.local', '.env']`
  (de canonieke versie heeft drift — dit is een correctie)

**Niet aanpassen:**

- De vijf internal building blocks (alleen overnemen)
- VPN-detectie in `_show-endpoints`
- HTTPS curl `-k` handling in `_wait-for-endpoint`
- Doctor-task tooling-checks (alleen aanvullen met stack-specifiek)

---

## Bekende drift in `canonical/` (correcties die de skill toepast)

De canonieke set is gold standard maar bevat 2 kleine inconsistenties die de
skill bij genereren rechtzet:

1. **dotenv-volgorde:** root `Taskfile.yml` heeft `dotenv: ['.env', '.env.local']`.
   Skill schrijft altijd `['.env.local', '.env']` zodat lokale override wint.

2. **Runtime-dir naam:** `core.yml` gebruikt `.taskrun/`. Skill standaardiseert op
   `.task/` voor consistentie met de bredere convention in Brecht's collectie.

Beide zijn opgenomen als hard rules in `skill.md` §10 *Validatiechecklist*.

---

| File hier | Origineel pad |

| `canonical/Taskfile.yml` | `linuxoptiplexvpn/nextjs_frontend-gdriverights/Taskfile.yml` |
| `canonical/taskfiles/core.yml` | `linuxoptiplexvpn/nextjs_frontend-gdriverights/taskfiles/core.yml` |
| `canonical/taskfiles/project.yml` | `linuxoptiplexvpn/nextjs_frontend-gdriverights/taskfiles/project.yml` |
| `patterns/core-multi-service.yml` | `linuxoptiplexvpn/_research_BingelAgendaLesFicheScraper/taskfiles/core.yml` |
| `patterns/core-shared-server-safe.yml` | `linuxoptiplexvpn/bingelKuCuDoelenRapportering2026/taskfiles/core.yml` |
| `patterns/core-prod-pipeline.yml` | `linuxoptiplexvpn/clasp_kalendertoolv202601/taskfiles/core.yml` |

## §4 — Gen-3 core.yml canoniek

**De canonieke template staat als drop-in bestand in `references/canonical/`.**

Bron-identificatie: `linuxoptiplexvpn/nextjs_frontend-gdriverights/` is de meest geavanceerde gen-3 in Brechts collectie (774 regels core.yml, 8 internal building blocks, HTTPS-aware, `nmcli`-gebaseerde 4-laags VPN-detectie, mtime-auto-setup, openssl SAN-check). Zie `references/README.md` voor de volledige feature-matrix versus alternatieven.

**Werkmodus van de skill:**

1. Bij NEW: kopieer alle drie de files uit `references/canonical/` naar het doelproject:
   - `Taskfile.yml` → repo root
   - `taskfiles/core.yml`
   - `taskfiles/project.yml`
2. Pas alle vars aan volgens **Customization-checklist** in `references/README.md`
3. Pas de twee bekende drift-correcties toe (zie §10):
   - `dotenv: ['.env', '.env.local']` → `['.env.local', '.env']`
   - `RUNTIME_DIR: .taskrun` → `.task`
4. Voeg stack-specifieke `doctor:` checks toe in `project.yml`

**De vijf verplichte gen-3 internal building blocks** (in elke variant van core.yml die deze skill produceert):

| Building block | Doel |
|---|---|
| `_ensure-ready` | mtime-vergelijking lockfile ↔ deps marker → auto `task setup` |
| `_kill-mode` | PID-bestand → fuser orphan-cleanup op poort |
| `_wait-for-endpoint` | curl-polling met SCHEME-detect, configurable timeout |
| `_show-endpoints` | multi-iface VPN-detectie + lokale + vpn endpoint-test |
| `_bootstrap-env` | `.env.example` → `.env.local` fallback chain |

**Daarnaast 3 patroon-fragmenten** voor specifieke project-types (in `references/patterns/`):

| Bestand | Wanneer toepassen |
|---|---|
| `core-multi-service.yml` | Project met >1 langlopend service-proces (backend+frontend parallel). Neem over: aparte PID/log vars per service, `_stop:service` met parameter, **PGID-kill** voor orphan-children |
| `core-shared-server-safe.yml` | Project op shared server. Neem over: `stop_if_owned` met `/proc/$PID/cwd` check vóór killen |
| `core-prod-pipeline.yml` | Project met parallelle prod-stack (eigen ports/PIDs/logs naast dev). Neem over: `PROD_BACKEND_PID/PGID/LOG` vars, externe `./scripts/stop_service.sh`, `prod:rebuild` |

**Skeleton voor wie geen toegang heeft tot `references/canonical/`** (bv. wanneer de skill in een andere context wordt gebruikt zonder de referentie-files):
