content.text:
Klaar. De canonieke template is geïdentificeerd, gekopieerd, en de skill verwijst er nu direct naar.

**Het verdict:**

`linuxoptiplexvpn/nextjs_frontend-gdriverights/` is dé meest geavanceerde gen-3 in je collectie — 774 regels core.yml met 8 internal building blocks, HTTPS-aware lifecycle, mtime-gebaseerde auto-setup, openssl SAN-check, en `nmcli`-eerst 4-laags VPN-detectie. De `linuxoptiplexpagaaiervpn`-versie van diezelfde repo is een eerdere snapshot (575 regels) zonder HTTPS-support, `_ensure-ready` of `_bootstrap-env` — niet gebruiken.

**Wat er nu klaarstaat:**

- [`references/canonical/`](computer://C:\Users\BrechtParmentier\repos\_verzameldeTaskfiles\references\canonical) — drop-in trio (Taskfile.yml + taskfiles/core.yml + taskfiles/project.yml)
- [`references/patterns/core-multi-service.yml`](computer://C:\Users\BrechtParmentier\repos\_verzameldeTaskfiles\references\patterns\core-multi-service.yml) — voor backend+frontend parallel (uniek: PGID-kill voor orphan-children)
- [`references/patterns/core-shared-server-safe.yml`](computer://C:\Users\BrechtParmentier\repos\_verzameldeTaskfiles\references\patterns\core-shared-server-safe.yml) — voor shared-host scenarios (`stop_if_owned`)
- [`references/patterns/core-prod-pipeline.yml`](computer://C:\Users\BrechtParmentier\repos\_verzameldeTaskfiles\references\patterns\core-prod-pipeline.yml) — voor parallelle prod-stack
- [`references/README.md`](computer://C:\Users\BrechtParmentier\repos\_verzameldeTaskfiles\references\README.md) — uitleg + customization-checklist + bekende drift-correcties
- [`skill.md`](computer://C:\Users\BrechtParmentier\repos\_verzameldeTaskfiles\skill.md) — §4 en §11 verwijzen nu expliciet naar deze references; de inline skeleton blijft als fallback

**Twee drift-correcties die de skill standaard toepast bij hergebruik** (omdat ook de gold standard ze niet 100% goed heeft):

1. `dotenv: ['.env', '.env.local']` → `['.env.local', '.env']` (override moet winnen)
2. `RUNTIME_DIR: .taskrun` → `.task` (consistentie met de bredere conventie in je collectie)

**Drie patroon-fragmenten** die *niet* in canonical zitten maar er bij specifieke project-types bij genomen moeten worden — staan met regelnummers en doel beschreven in `references/README.md`. De skill weet via §4 wanneer welke toepassen.

Sources: feature-matrix uit subagent-analyse, file-inhoud via Read tool.

content: Wat moet er nu nog gebeuren om de "perfecte" Taskfile.yml skill / prompt te kunnen bouwen?

message.content: Wat moet er nu nog gebeuren om de "perfecte" Taskfile.yml skill / prompt te kunnen bouwen?

content.text:
Eerlijk overzicht van wat er nog ontbreekt voordat de skill écht "perfect" is. Gegroepeerd op prioriteit.

## Wat er staat (om context te geven)

- Skill-spec compleet (`skill.md`) met beslisboom, 8 profielen, conventies, audit-model, niet-doen, test-prompts
- 1 canonieke drop-in set in `references/canonical/` (Next.js)
- 3 patroon-fragmenten voor specifieke use-cases
- README met customization-checklist en bekende drift

## MUST — zonder dit faalt de skill voor 7 van de 8 profielen

**Per-stack templates** ontbreken nog. Canonical/ is Next.js-specifiek. Voor de skill om consistent te leveren bij elk profiel moet er in `references/profiles/`:

- [ ] `profile-python.yml` — gen-3 core.yml met `uv sync`-detectie i.p.v. `pnpm-lock.yaml`-mtime, FastAPI/uvicorn `DEV_CMD`, geen HTTPS-cert-handling
- [ ] `profile-clasp.yml` — `CLASP_AUTH` dynamic-from-`.clasp.profile` + clasp push/pull/deploy in plaats van Next.js dev/prod
- [ ] `profile-vscode-ext.yml` — `core.yml` met TS-watcher als achtergrondservice (geen frontend-poort, geen VPN-detectie nodig)
- [ ] `profile-cli-tool.yml` — single-file Pattern C template met heredoc-help + shortcut-aliases
- [ ] `profile-server-pm2.yml` — kort: alleen lifecycle + `service:install/enable/disable`
- [ ] `profile-multi-service.yml` — dit is grotendeels al `patterns/core-multi-service.yml`, maar als profile uitgewerkt
- [ ] `profile-toolbelt.yml` — root-Taskfile met sub-includes per child-project

**Stack-specifieke `doctor:` checks**. De canonieke doctor checkt node/pnpm/fnm. Voor andere stacks heb je `uv`, `python`, `clasp`, `code-insiders`, `pm2`, etc. Korte tabel volstaat.

## SHOULD — zonder dit voelt de skill amateuristisch

- [ ] **Drift wegwerken in `references/canonical/`** — nu staat er `dotenv: ['.env', '.env.local']` en `RUNTIME_DIR: .taskrun` in en moet de skill bij elke generatie corrigeren. Twee kleine edits in canonical en je probleem is weg. Ik raad aan dit nu te doen.
- [ ] **`references/audit-output-format.md`** — concrete markdown- of JSON-structuur voor de audit-rapport. Nu zegt §6 "geef score op 100" maar niet *hoe*.
- [ ] **Anti-pattern fix-table** — §5b lijst 20 anti-patterns met severiteit. Voeg per anti-pattern een 1-regel "vervang dit door dat" toe. Dat maakt audits onmiddellijk actionable.
- [ ] **Refactor-script per migratiepad** — §7 schetst 4 paden (D→A, C→A, gen1→gen3, A→B) maar zonder concrete diff-voorbeelden. Eén voorbeeld per pad is genoeg.
- [ ] **`.env.example` + `.task/.gitignore` mini-templates** — een gegenereerde Taskfile-set zonder deze twee is incompleet en de gebruiker krijgt direct frictie.
- [ ] **`BREAKING.md` template voor refactors** — §7 stap 3 verwijst er naar; de skill moet er een kunnen genereren.

## TEST — zonder dit weet je niet of de skill werkt

- [ ] **De skill installeren als skill** — nu staat `skill.md` in je collectie-folder. Om Cowork hem te laten triggeren moet hij in `~/.claude/skills/taskfiles/SKILL.md` (of jouw plugin-pad) staan. Tot die stap is alles theoretisch.
- [ ] **Drie real-runs doen na installatie:** 1× NEW (Python project), 1× AUDIT (een bestaande gen-1 Taskfile uit je collectie), 1× REFACTOR (`nextjs_garagebox` van 1180 regels naar Pattern A). Dit gaat zwakke plekken aan het licht brengen die je nu nog niet kan voorzien.
- [ ] **Skill-evals**. De `skill-creator` skill kan benchmarks draaien op trigger-accuracy en output-kwaliteit. De 8 test-prompts in §13 zijn prima startset.

## NICE — afwerking

- [ ] Mermaid-diagram voor de §2 beslisboom (visueel scanbaar voor ADD)
- [ ] `validators/validate-taskfile.sh` — bash-script dat §10 validatiechecklist statisch runt
- [ ] Integratie met je bestaande `tools_taskfile-silent` audit-tool i.p.v. dubbel werk
- [ ] Skill memory voor jouw conventies (poorten-bereik, package-manager voorkeur, RUNTIME_DIR)

## Mijn advies — concrete volgende stap

Als je één ding wil aanpakken, doe dit:

**Maak `profile-python.yml` en `profile-clasp.yml` aan** (de twee meest gebruikte stacks na Next.js in jouw collectie). Daarna installeer je de skill en doe je een real-run NEW Python project. Pas op basis daarvan de profielen bij.

Reden: per-stack templates zijn de grootste bottleneck en je hebt al twee Python en Clasp golds in je collectie (`linuxoptiplexvpn/python_rubricsObservatieTool/` en `linuxoptiplexvpn/clasp_kalendertoolv202601/`). De skill kan ze grotendeels generen — geef me het commando en ik pak het aan in dezelfde stijl als wat we voor canonical/ deden.

Welke wil je eerst?

content.text:
Goeie vraag. De meeste data zit al in je collectie — ik moet daar maar een paar gaten vullen. Per profile uitgesplitst:

## Wat ik zelf uit je collectie haal (geen input nodig)

Voor elk profile heb je al een gold-standard repo:

| Profile | Bron-repo |
|---|---|
| Python | `linuxoptiplexvpn/python_rubricsObservatieTool/` (B) + `python_leerlokaalFV/` (A) |
| Clasp full-stack | `linuxoptiplexvpn/clasp_kalendertoolv202601/` |
| Clasp minimaal | `linuxoptiplexvpn/digiSchoolKalender2526GKOK/` |
| VS Code ext | `linuxoptiplexvpn/vscodeExt_combineFilesToOne/` |
| CLI tool | `linuxoptiplexvpn/tools_ufw/` |
| Server PM2 | `linodeserver/wireguardTool/` |
| Multi-service | `linuxoptiplexvpn/_research_BingelAgendaLesFicheScraper/` (al gekopieerd in patterns/) |
| Toolbelt | `linuxpc92/_linuxTools/` |

Daaruit kan ik 80% van elk profile destilleren: vars, lifecycle, doctor-checks, namespaces.

## Wat ik echt van jou nodig heb — globaal

**Cross-profile defaults** (4 vragen, eenmalig):

1. **Port-range conventie.** Je collectie laat heel verschillende poorten zien (3000, 6180, 10260, 44007, 44385). Heb je een systeem? (bv. "dev = 6xxx, prod = 44xxx, demo = 28xxx") of kies je per project?
2. **Drift-correcties bij hergebruik.** Mag ik gold-standards "fixen" waar ze afwijken van de skill-conventie (`dotenv` volgorde, `.taskrun` → `.task`)? Standaard zou ik ja zeggen, bevestig.
3. **Default test-runner / linter / formatter** per stack. Out of the box raad ik Python: `uv`/`pytest`/`ruff`/`ruff format`/`mypy` aan. Akkoord, of andere keuzes?
4. **Stack-specifiek doctor.** Welke 3-5 tools moeten in elke `doctor:` voorkomen per stack? Kan ik uit collectie halen, maar bevestiging is sneller.

## Per profile — wat ik nog niet weet

**Python (5 minuten input)**
- Always-include: FastAPI, of ook Django? (collectie laat alleen FastAPI zien)
- Hot-reload default `--reload` aan in dev?
- Multi-service Python+frontend: welke combinatie verwacht je het meest? (FastAPI+Vite, FastAPI+Next, FastAPI+vanilla)?

**Clasp (3 minuten input)**
- Mag de skill een minimale `.clasp.profile` template genereren als hij niet bestaat?
- Multi-target Clasp (één codebase, meerdere GAS-scripts) ondersteunen of niet?

**VS Code extension (2 minuten input)**
- Build-tool: `tsc` (zoals `vscodeExt_combineFilesToOne`), of esbuild/webpack?
- Publish via `vsce` only, of ook `ovsx` (Open VSX)?

**CLI-tool (1 vraag)**
- Heredoc-help of printf-help als default? Beide komen in collectie voor; `tools_ufw` is heredoc, `tools_NASManager` is heredoc, garagebox is printf. Mijn voorkeur: heredoc voor static, printf wanneer dynamische url/mode nodig is. Akkoord?

**Server PM2 + multi-service + toolbelt** — geen vragen, ik heb genoeg context uit de gold-standards.

## Advies — minimal viable approach

Geef me alleen de **4 cross-profile vragen** + **3 Python-specifieke vragen**, en ik maak `profile-python.yml` af. Daarna een real-run, en pas op basis van wat daar fout gaat itereren we voor Clasp en de rest.

Anders gezegd: ik heb geen 30 antwoorden nodig, maar 7. Wil je die in één keer beantwoorden, of ankerpunt-voor-ankerpunt? Voor jouw werkstijl raad ik het laatste aan — start met vraag 1 (port-range conventie) en bouw vandaar uit.

content.text:
Helder. Calcport zit dus al in `_research_BingelAgendaLesFicheScraper` als `sh:` var pattern, met `task ports` als showcase en als doctor-check. Ik maak dat **standaard** in elke nieuwe profile.

Hier mijn voorstel voor de drie open punten — bevestig en ik begin met `profile-python.yml`.

## Calcport-integratie wordt standaard

In elke profile-template en in de canonieke set:

- `vars:` blok haalt poorten uit `ports.json` (geen hardcoded ports meer in core.yml)
- `task ports` als standaard task (alle profiles, niet alleen multi-service)
- `calcport` als required tool in doctor
- Fallback: als `ports.json` ontbreekt, leest de skill `ports.md` of roept `calcport` direct aan
- Bij NEW genereert de skill ook een minimale `ports.json` als die nog niet bestaat

Dit betekent ook dat ik in `references/canonical/` de hardcoded `DEV_PORT: '44007'` en `PROD_PORT: '44008'` ga vervangen door calcport-driven vars (drift-correctie #3).

## Tooling minimaal per stack — voorstel

Less is more. Per stack alleen wat écht nodig is:

| Stack | Linter | Formatter | Type-check | Test | Optioneel |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Next.js | eslint | prettier | tsc | vitest | (canonical zoals het is) |
| Python | **ruff** (lint + format in 1 tool) | (zelfde ruff) | — *(optioneel: mypy)* | pytest | — |
| Clasp | — | — | — | — | (clasp doet validatie zelf) |
| VS Code ext | — *(tsc strict is genoeg)* | — | tsc | @vscode/test-electron | eslint optioneel |
| CLI/tool | shellcheck | shfmt (als shell), ruff (als python) | — | — | — |
| Server PM2 | — | — | — | — | — |

**Drie keuzes om te bevestigen:**
1. **Python: alleen ruff** als lint+format (één tool i.p.v. ruff/black/pylint/flake8). Mypy als opt-in, niet default. Akkoord?
2. **VS Code ext: geen eslint default** — strict tsc dekt 90%. Akkoord?
3. **Clasp: geen lint/test default** — projecten zijn meestal klein genoeg dat reviews volstaan. Akkoord?

## Doctor per stack — mijn voorstel

| Stack | Required | Optional (warning, geen fail) |
|---|---|---|
| Universeel | `task`, `git`, `calcport` | — |
| Next.js | + `node`, `pnpm`, `lsof` | `fnm`, `docker` |
| Python | + `uv`, `python`, `lsof` | `docker` |
| Clasp | + `clasp`, `node` | — |
| VS Code ext | + `node`, `pnpm` | `vsce`, `ovsx` |
| CLI/tool | + (per stack) | — |
| Server PM2 | + `node`, `pm2` | `systemctl` |

`lsof` zit overal waar runtime-poorten relevant zijn — dat is voor het echte VPN/port-detect werk in `_show-endpoints` en `_kill-mode`.

## Volgende stap

Als je akkoord gaat met:
- Calcport-integratie standaard
- Python = uv + ruff + pytest (mypy opt-in)
- Doctor-tabel hierboven

…dan start ik nu `profile-python.yml` met `python_leerlokaalFV` als basis (Pattern A, eenvoudiger) en `python_rubricsObservatieTool` als referentie voor de B-pattern uitbreiding (db.yml/native.yml/docker.yml). Drift-correcties (`.task`, dotenv-volgorde, calcport, ruff-only) pas ik direct toe.

Bevestig met "go" of geef de aanpassingen door.

file.content:
# Taskfile.yml — leerlokaal
# ⛔ GEEN output: prefixed   ⛔ GEEN silent: false op taken
version: '3'
silent: true
dotenv: ['.env', '.env.local']

includes:
  core:
    taskfile: ./taskfiles/core.yml
    optional: false
    dir: .
  project:
    taskfile: ./taskfiles/project.yml
    optional: true
    dir: .

tasks:
  default:
    desc: Show quick help
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: core:help

  help:
    desc: Show available top-level commands
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: core:help

  start:
    desc: Start full stack (frontend + API)
    cmds:
      - task: core:start

  stop:
    desc: Stop full stack
    cmds:
      - task: core:stop

  restart:
    desc: Restart full stack
    cmds:
      - task: core:restart

  logs:
    desc: Follow logs
    cmds:
      - task: core:logs

  status:
    desc: Show service status
    cmds:
      - task: core:status

172	        done
173	        if ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ':{{.BACKEND_PORT}}' || \

216	        else
217	          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m frontend start mislukt — check logs/frontend.log\n"
218	          tail -20 logs/frontend.log || true

220	        fi
221	
222	  _stop_api:
223	    internal: true

225	    cmds:
226	      - |

228	        if [ -f logs/api_server.pid ]; then

237	          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m  api gestopt\n"
238	        else
239	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m api poort {{.BACKEND_PORT}} nog bezet\n"
240	        fi
241	
242	  _stop_frontend:
243	    internal: true
244	    silent: false
245	    cmds:
246	      - |
247	        # Try PID file first, then fall back to pkill
248	        if [ -f logs/frontend.pid ]; then
249	          PID="$(cat logs/frontend.pid)"

252	        fi

254	        # Kill anything still on the frontend port

257	        fi
258	        sleep 1
259	        if ! ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ':{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}'; then
260	          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m  frontend gestopt\n"
261	        else
262	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m frontend poort {{.FRONTEND_PORT}} nog bezet\n"

file.content:
# taskfiles/core.yml — leerlokaal core layer
# ⛔ GEEN output: prefixed   ⛔ GEEN silent: false op taken
version: '3'
silent: true

vars:
  APP_NAME: '{{default "leerlokaal" .APP_NAME}}'
  FRONTEND_PORT: '{{default "35567" .FRONTEND_PORT}}'
  BACKEND_PORT: '{{default "35568" .BACKEND_PORT}}'
  PYTHON: '{{default "python3" .PYTHON}}'
  VPN_IP: '{{default "" .VPN_IP}}'

tasks:
  help:
    desc: Show core command help
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        VPN_IP="${VPN_IP:-$(ip -4 addr show tun0 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '(?<=inet\s)\d+(\.\d+){3}' || echo "")}"
        if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
          FE_URL="http://${VPN_IP}:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
          API_URL="http://${VPN_IP}:{{.BACKEND_PORT}}"
        else
          FE_URL="http://localhost:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
          API_URL="http://localhost:{{.BACKEND_PORT}}"
        fi
        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== {{.APP_NAME}} ===\033[0m\n"
        printf "\033[1mapp:\033[0m       %s\n" "{{.APP_NAME}}"
        printf "\033[1mmode:\033[0m      local (React + FastAPI)\n"
        printf "\033[1mfrontend:\033[0m  %s\n" "$FE_URL"
        printf "\033[1mapi:\033[0m       %s\n" "$API_URL"
        printf "\033[1mapi docs:\033[0m  %s/docs\n" "$API_URL"
        printf "\n\033[1;33mCore commands:\033[0m\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask start\033[0m      start full stack (frontend + API)\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask stop\033[0m       stop full stack\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask restart\033[0m    restart full stack\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask logs\033[0m       tail all logs\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask status\033[0m     service status\n"
        if [ -f "taskfiles/project.yml" ]; then
          printf "\n\033[1;33mProject commands:\033[0m\n"
          printf "  \033[32mtask project:install\033[0m    install dependencies\n"
          printf "  \033[32mtask project:test\033[0m       run tests\n"
          printf "  \033[32mtask project:lint\033[0m       lint Python sources\n"
          printf "  \033[32mtask project:db-stats\033[0m   database statistics\n"
          printf "  \033[32mtask project:db-backup\033[0m  backup database\n"
          printf "  \033[32mtask project:db-import\033[0m  import curriculum data\n"
          printf "  \033[32mtask project:clean\033[0m      clean temp files\n"
        fi
        printf "\n"

  start:
    desc: Start full stack (API + frontend)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: _ensure_runtime_dirs
      - task: _start_api
      - task: _start_frontend
      - |
        VPN_IP="${VPN_IP:-$(ip -4 addr show tun0 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '(?<=inet\s)\d+(\.\d+){3}' || echo "")}"
        if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
          FE_URL="http://${VPN_IP}:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
          API_URL="http://${VPN_IP}:{{.BACKEND_PORT}}"
        else
          FE_URL="http://localhost:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
          API_URL="http://localhost:{{.BACKEND_PORT}}"
        fi
        printf "\n\033[32m[OK]\033[0m volledige stack gestart\n"
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m frontend:  %s\n" "$FE_URL"
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m api:       %s\n" "$API_URL"
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m api docs:  %s/docs\n" "$API_URL"

  stop:
    desc: Stop full stack (API + frontend)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: _stop_frontend
      - task: _stop_api
      - |
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m volledige stack gestopt\n"

  restart:
    desc: Restart full stack
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: stop
      - task: start

  logs:
    desc: Follow all logs (frontend + API)
    cmds:
      - |
        mkdir -p logs
        touch logs/frontend.log logs/api_server.log 2>/dev/null || true
        tail -f logs/api_server.log logs/frontend.log

  logs-api:
    desc: Follow API backend logs only
    cmds:
      - |
        mkdir -p logs
        touch logs/api_server.log 2>/dev/null || true
        tail -f logs/api_server.log

  logs-frontend:
    desc: Follow frontend logs only
    cmds:
      - |
        mkdir -p logs
        touch logs/frontend.log 2>/dev/null || true
        tail -f logs/frontend.log

  status:
    desc: Show service status (API + frontend)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        VPN_IP="${VPN_IP:-$(ip -4 addr show tun0 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '(?<=inet\s)\d+(\.\d+){3}' || echo "")}"
        if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
          FE_URL="http://${VPN_IP}:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
          API_URL="http://${VPN_IP}:{{.BACKEND_PORT}}"
        else
          FE_URL="http://localhost:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
          API_URL="http://localhost:{{.BACKEND_PORT}}"
        fi
        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== status: {{.APP_NAME}} ===\033[0m\n"

        # API status — check port
        if ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ':{{.BACKEND_PORT}}' || \
           lsof -ti:{{.BACKEND_PORT}} >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m  api       running  %s\n" "$API_URL"
        else
          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m api       not running\n"
        fi

        # Frontend status — check port
        if ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ':{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}' || \
           lsof -ti:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}} >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m  frontend  running  %s\n" "$FE_URL"
        else
          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m frontend  not running\n"
        fi
        printf "\n"

  # ── Internal helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _ensure_runtime_dirs:
    internal: true
    cmds:
      - mkdir -p logs .task

  _start_api:
    internal: true
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        pkill -f 'uvicorn.*leerlokaal.backend.api_server' 2>/dev/null || true
        sleep 1
        PYTHONPATH=src nohup {{.PYTHON}} -m uvicorn leerlokaal.backend.api_server:app \
          --host 0.0.0.0 --port {{.BACKEND_PORT}} \
          --reload --reload-dir src \
          > logs/api_server.log 2>&1 &
        echo $! > logs/api_server.pid
        # Wait for port to open (max 15s) — more reliable than PID check
        TIMEOUT=15
        while [ $TIMEOUT -gt 0 ]; do
          if ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ':{{.BACKEND_PORT}}' || \
             lsof -ti:{{.BACKEND_PORT}} >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            break
          fi
          sleep 1
          TIMEOUT=$((TIMEOUT - 1))
        done
        if ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ':{{.BACKEND_PORT}}' || \
           lsof -ti:{{.BACKEND_PORT}} >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m  api gestart (port={{.BACKEND_PORT}})\n"
        else
          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m api start mislukt — check logs/api_server.log\n"
          tail -20 logs/api_server.log || true
          exit 1
        fi

  _start_frontend:
    internal: true
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        # Free port if occupied
        if command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          PIDS=$(lsof -ti:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}} 2>/dev/null || true)
          if [ -n "$PIDS" ]; then
            echo "$PIDS" | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
          fi
        fi
        pkill -f 'vite.*leerlokaalFV' 2>/dev/null || true
        sleep 1
        # Auto-install frontend deps if node_modules missing
        if [ ! -d frontend/node_modules ]; then
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m frontend/node_modules ontbreekt — pnpm install uitvoeren...\n"
          cd frontend && pnpm install && cd ..
        fi
        nohup sh -c 'cd frontend && pnpm dev' > logs/frontend.log 2>&1 &
        echo $! > logs/frontend.pid
        # Wait for port to open (max 20s) — vite can take a few seconds
        TIMEOUT=20
        while [ $TIMEOUT -gt 0 ]; do
          if ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ':{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}' || \
             lsof -ti:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}} >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            break
          fi
          sleep 1
          TIMEOUT=$((TIMEOUT - 1))
        done
        if ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ':{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}' || \
           lsof -ti:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}} >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m  frontend gestart (port={{.FRONTEND_PORT}})\n"
        else
          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m frontend start mislukt — check logs/frontend.log\n"
          tail -20 logs/frontend.log || true
          exit 1
        fi

  _stop_api:
    internal: true
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        # Try PID file first, then fall back to pkill
        if [ -f logs/api_server.pid ]; then
          PID="$(cat logs/api_server.pid)"
          kill "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
          rm -f logs/api_server.pid
        fi
        pkill -f 'uvicorn.*leerlokaal.backend.api_server' 2>/dev/null || true
        # Verify port is free
        sleep 1
        if ! ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ':{{.BACKEND_PORT}}'; then
          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m  api gestopt\n"
        else
          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m api poort {{.BACKEND_PORT}} nog bezet\n"
        fi

  _stop_frontend:
    internal: true
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        # Try PID file first, then fall back to pkill
        if [ -f logs/frontend.pid ]; then
          PID="$(cat logs/frontend.pid)"
          kill "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
          rm -f logs/frontend.pid
        fi
        pkill -f 'vite.*leerlokaalFV' 2>/dev/null || true
        # Kill anything still on the frontend port
        if command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          lsof -ti:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}} 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
        fi
        sleep 1
        if ! ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ':{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}'; then
          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m  frontend gestopt\n"
        else
          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m frontend poort {{.FRONTEND_PORT}} nog bezet\n"
        fi

lastPrompt: go

file.content:
# taskfiles/project.yml — leerlokaal project-specific tasks
# ⛔ GEEN output: prefixed   ⛔ GEEN silent: false op taken
version: '3'
silent: true

vars:
  APP_NAME: '{{default "leerlokaal" .APP_NAME}}'
  PYTHON: '{{default "python3" .PYTHON}}'
  FRONTEND_PORT: '{{default "35567" .FRONTEND_PORT}}'
  BACKEND_PORT: '{{default "35568" .BACKEND_PORT}}'
  DB_HOST: '{{default "10.0.0.1" .DB_HOST}}'
  DB_NAME: '{{default "leerlokaal_db" .DB_NAME}}'
  DB_USER: '{{default "brecht" .DB_USER}}'
  DB_PASSWORD: '{{default "" .DB_PASSWORD}}'
  API_SERVER: 'src/leerlokaal/backend/api_server.py'
  CURRICULUM_IMPORTER: 'src/leerlokaal/backend/curriculum_importer_v2.py'
  CURRICULUM_QUERY: 'src/leerlokaal/scripts/curriculum_query_tool.py'
  IMPORT_JSON: 'data/questi_goaltree.json'
  PY_SOURCES: 'src/leerlokaal'

tasks:
  install:
    desc: Install all dependencies (Python + Node)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Installing system packages...\n"
        sudo apt update -qq
        sudo apt install -y python3-psycopg2 python3-pip nodejs npm
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Installing Python packages...\n"
        pip3 install --break-system-packages plotly pandas fastapi uvicorn psycopg2-binary psutil
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Installing Node global tools...\n"
        sudo npm install -g pnpm pm2
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Installing frontend deps...\n"
        cd frontend && pnpm install
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m installatie klaar\n"

  test:
    desc: Run all tests (db + import + syntax)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: test-db
      - task: test-import
      - task: test-syntax
      - |
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m alle tests geslaagd\n"

  test-db:
    desc: Test database connection
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m database verbinding testen...\n"
        {{.PYTHON}} -c "
        import psycopg2
        conn = psycopg2.connect(
          host='{{.DB_HOST}}',
          database='{{.DB_NAME}}',
          user='{{.DB_USER}}',
          password='{{.DB_PASSWORD}}'
        )
        conn.close()
        print('OK')
        " && printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m database verbinding OK\n" \
          || { printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m database verbinding mislukt\n"; exit 1; }

  test-import:
    desc: Test curriculum importer import
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m import module laden...\n"
        PYTHONPATH=src {{.PYTHON}} -c \
          "from leerlokaal.backend.curriculum_importer_v2 import CurriculumImporterV2; print('OK')" \
          && printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m CurriculumImporterV2 laadt OK\n" \
          || { printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m importmodule laad mislukt\n"; exit 1; }

  test-syntax:
    desc: Syntax check Python sources
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m syntax check...\n"
        {{.PYTHON}} -m py_compile {{.API_SERVER}} {{.CURRICULUM_QUERY}} {{.CURRICULUM_IMPORTER}} \
          && printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m syntax OK\n" \
          || { printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m syntax errors gevonden\n"; exit 1; }

  lint:
    desc: Lint Python sources (syntax check)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m linting Python bronbestanden...\n"
        ERRORS=0
        while IFS= read -r -d '' f; do
          {{.PYTHON}} -m py_compile "$f" 2>/dev/null || { printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m %s\n" "$f"; ERRORS=$((ERRORS+1)); }
        done < <(find {{.PY_SOURCES}} -name '*.py' -print0)
        if [ "$ERRORS" -eq 0 ]; then
          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m alle bestanden syntax OK\n"
        else
          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m %d bestanden met syntax errors\n" "$ERRORS"
          exit 1
        fi

  format:
    desc: Format code (placeholder)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m formatter nog niet geconfigureerd\n"
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m gebruik: pip install black && black src/\n"

  clean:
    desc: Clean temporary files and caches
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m schoonmaken...\n"
        find . -type f -name "*.pyc" -delete
        find . -type d -name "__pycache__" -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
        rm -f ecosystem.config.js
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m schoongemaakt\n"

  # ── Database ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  db-stats:
    desc: Show database statistics
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m database statistieken...\n"
        PYTHONPATH=src {{.PYTHON}} {{.CURRICULUM_QUERY}} --password '{{.DB_PASSWORD}}' stats

  db-backup:
    desc: Create PostgreSQL database backup
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        STAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
        FILE="backups/backup_${STAMP}.sql"
        mkdir -p backups
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m backup maken → %s\n" "$FILE"
        PGPASSWORD='{{.DB_PASSWORD}}' pg_dump -h {{.DB_HOST}} -U {{.DB_USER}} {{.DB_NAME}} > "$FILE"
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m backup opgeslagen: %s\n" "$FILE"

  db-import:
    desc: Import curriculum data from JSON
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m curriculum data importeren...\n"
        PYTHONPATH=src {{.PYTHON}} {{.CURRICULUM_IMPORTER}} {{.IMPORT_JSON}} \
          --password '{{.DB_PASSWORD}}' --verify
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m import klaar\n"

  # ── Info ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  urls:
    desc: Show all service URLs
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        VPN_IP="${VPN_IP:-$(ip -4 addr show tun0 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '(?<=inet\s)\d+(\.\d+){3}' || echo "")}"
        HOST="${VPN_IP:-localhost}"
        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== URLs: {{.APP_NAME}} ===\033[0m\n"
        printf "\033[1mFrontend:\033[0m  http://%s:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}\n" "$HOST"
        printf "\033[1mAPI:\033[0m       http://%s:{{.BACKEND_PORT}}\n" "$HOST"
        printf "\033[1mAPI Docs:\033[0m  http://%s:{{.BACKEND_PORT}}/docs\n" "$HOST"
        printf "\033[1mHealth:\033[0m    http://%s:{{.BACKEND_PORT}}/health\n" "$HOST"
        printf "\n"

  version:
    desc: Show version information
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== versie-info: {{.APP_NAME}} ===\033[0m\n"
        printf "\033[1mPython:\033[0m  %s\n" "$({{.PYTHON}} --version 2>&1)"
        printf "\033[1mNode:\033[0m    %s\n" "$(node --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'niet gevonden')"
        printf "\033[1mpnpm:\033[0m    %s\n" "$(pnpm --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'niet gevonden')"
        printf "\033[1mPM2:\033[0m     %s\n" "$(pm2 --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'niet gevonden')"
        printf "\033[1mFrontend:\033[0m React + Vite (frontend/package.json)\n"
        printf "\033[1mBackend:\033[0m  FastAPI + uvicorn (requirements.txt)\n"
        printf "\n"

  health:
    desc: Full health check (db + status)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: test-db
      - |
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m service status...\n"
        if ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ':{{.BACKEND_PORT}}' || \
           lsof -ti:{{.BACKEND_PORT}} >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m  api       draait (port={{.BACKEND_PORT}})\n"
        else
          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m api       draait niet\n"
        fi
        if ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ':{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}' || \
           lsof -ti:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}} >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m  frontend  draait (port={{.FRONTEND_PORT}})\n"
        else
          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m frontend  draait niet\n"
        fi
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m health check klaar\n"

  demo-search:
    desc: Demo — zoek 'wiskunde' in curriculum
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m demo zoeken: wiskunde\n"
        PYTHONPATH=src {{.PYTHON}} {{.CURRICULUM_QUERY}} --password '{{.DB_PASSWORD}}' \
          search "wiskunde" --limit 5

  demo-export:
    desc: Demo — exporteer Fase 1 items
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m demo export: Fase 1\n"
        PYTHONPATH=src {{.PYTHON}} {{.CURRICULUM_QUERY}} --password '{{.DB_PASSWORD}}' \
          export demo_export.json --phase "Fase 1"
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m export → demo_export.json\n"

# Taskfile.yml — Python profile (drop-in template)
# Stack: FastAPI/uvicorn backend, uv package manager, ruff lint+format, pytest
# Pattern A — thin facade die delegeert naar core (lifecycle) + project (build/test/quality)
version: '3'
silent: true
dotenv: ['.env.local', '.env']  # lokale override wint

includes:
  core:
    taskfile: ./taskfiles/core.yml
    optional: false
  project:
    taskfile: ./taskfiles/project.yml
    optional: false
  # Optioneel — voeg toe wanneer relevant:
  # frontend:
  #   taskfile: ./taskfiles/frontend.yml
  #   optional: true
  # db:
  #   taskfile: ./taskfiles/db.yml
  #   optional: true
  # docker:
  #   taskfile: ./taskfiles/docker.yml
  #   optional: true

tasks:
  # ── Lifecycle ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  default:
    desc: Toon help
    silent: false
    cmds: [task: core:help]

  help:
    desc: Toon beschikbare commando's
    silent: false
    cmds: [task: core:help]

  setup:        { desc: First-time setup,         cmds: [task: core:setup] }
  setup-quick:  { desc: Snelle setup (alleen sync), cmds: [task: core:setup-quick] }
  doctor:       { desc: Health-check tooling/env, cmds: [task: core:doctor] }
  install:      { desc: Install dependencies,     cmds: [task: core:install] }

  start:        { desc: Start app,                cmds: [task: core:start] }
  stop:         { desc: Stop app,                 cmds: [task: core:stop] }
  restart:      { desc: Restart app,              cmds: [task: core:restart] }
  logs:         { desc: Tail logs,                cmds: [task: core:logs] }
  status:       { desc: Runtime status,           cmds: [task: core:status] }
  ports:        { desc: Toon calcport-poorten,    cmds: [task: core:ports] }

  # ── Project (testen/lint/format) ─────────────────────────────────────────
  test:
    desc: Run tests (pytest)
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:test

  lint:
    desc: Lint code (ruff check)
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:lint

  lint:fix:
    desc: Auto-fix lint issues (ruff check --fix)
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:lint-fix

  format:
    desc: Format code (ruff format)
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:format

  format:check:
    desc: Check formatting zonder wijzigingen
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:format-check

  check:
    desc: Lint + format-check
    cmds:
      - task: core:_ensure-ready
      - task: project:check

  # ── Maintenance ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  clean:        { desc: Verwijder caches,         cmds: [task: core:clean] }
  clean:logs:   { desc: Verwijder logbestanden,   cmds: [task: core:clean-logs] }
  clean:all:    { desc: Verwijder .venv + caches, cmds: [task: core:clean-all] }
  uninstall:    { desc: Verwijder .venv,          cmds: [task: core:uninstall] }

input.content:
# taskfiles/core.yml — Python profile core layer
# Stack: FastAPI/uvicorn + uv. Gen-3 lifecycle: setup-detection, PID-managed kill,
# waited startup, multi-iface VPN, env-bootstrap. Calcport-driven ports.
version: '3'
silent: true

vars:
  # ── Project identity ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  APP_NAME: '{{default "python-app" .APP_NAME}}'

  # ── Tooling ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  PYTHON: '{{default "python3" .PYTHON}}'
  UV: '{{default "uv" .UV}}'
  # Module-pad naar de FastAPI app (bv. "src.myapp.api:app" of "myapp.main:app")
  APP_MODULE: '{{default "src.app.main:app" .APP_MODULE}}'
  HOST: '{{default "0.0.0.0" .HOST}}'

  # ── Ports (uit ports.json via calcport, met fallback) ─────────────────────
  PORTS_FILE: '{{default "ports.json" .PORTS_FILE}}'
  BACKEND_DEV_PORT:
    sh: |
      if [ -f "{{.PORTS_FILE}}" ]; then
        python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(open("{{.PORTS_FILE}}")); print(d.get("standard_development",{}).get("backend") or d.get("backend",{}).get("dev") or 8000)' 2>/dev/null || echo 8000
      elif command -v calcport >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        calcport 2>/dev/null | awk '/backend.*dev/ {for(i=1;i<=NF;i++) if($i+0>0) {print $i; exit}}' || echo 8000
      else
        echo 8000
      fi
  BACKEND_PROD_PORT:
    sh: |
      if [ -f "{{.PORTS_FILE}}" ]; then
        python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(open("{{.PORTS_FILE}}")); print(d.get("standard_production",{}).get("backend") or d.get("backend",{}).get("prod") or 8001)' 2>/dev/null || echo 8001
      else
        echo 8001
      fi
  DEV_SCHEME: '{{default "http" .DEV_SCHEME}}'
  PROD_SCHEME: '{{default "http" .PROD_SCHEME}}'

  # ── Runtime paden (drift-correctie: .task ipv .taskrun) ───────────────────
  RUNTIME_DIR: '{{default ".task" .RUNTIME_DIR}}'
  LOGS_DIR: '{{default ".task/logs" .LOGS_DIR}}'
  DEV_LOG: '{{default ".task/logs/dev.log" .DEV_LOG}}'
  PROD_LOG: '{{default ".task/logs/prod.log" .PROD_LOG}}'
  DEPS_MARKER: '{{default ".task/.uv-installed" .DEPS_MARKER}}'

  # ── Docker ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  DOCKER_SERVICE: '{{default "app" .DOCKER_SERVICE}}'

  # ── Timeouts ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  START_TIMEOUT: '{{default "30" .START_TIMEOUT}}'
  STOP_TIMEOUT: '{{default "15" .STOP_TIMEOUT}}'

tasks:
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # HELP
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  help:
    desc: Toon overzicht van beschikbare commando's
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== {{.APP_NAME}} ===\033[0m\n"
        printf "\033[1mdev port:\033[0m  %s\n" "{{.BACKEND_DEV_PORT}}"
        printf "\033[1mprod port:\033[0m %s\n" "{{.BACKEND_PROD_PORT}}"
        printf "\033[1mmodule:\033[0m    %s\n" "{{.APP_MODULE}}"
        printf "\n\033[1;33mLifecycle:\033[0m\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask setup\033[0m        first-time setup (uv sync + env-bootstrap + doctor)\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask setup-quick\033[0m  snelle setup (alleen uv sync)\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask start\033[0m        start dev server (uvicorn --reload)\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask start-prod\033[0m   start productie server\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask stop\033[0m         stop server\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask restart\033[0m      restart dev server\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask logs\033[0m         tail logs\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask status\033[0m       service status + endpoints\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask doctor\033[0m       diagnose tooling/env\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask ports\033[0m        toon calcport-poorten\n"
        printf "\n\033[1;33mProject:\033[0m\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask install\033[0m      uv sync\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask test\033[0m         pytest\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask lint\033[0m         ruff check\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask lint:fix\033[0m     ruff check --fix\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask format\033[0m       ruff format\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask check\033[0m        lint + format-check\n"
        printf "\n\033[1;33mMaintenance:\033[0m\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask clean\033[0m        verwijder caches (__pycache__, .pytest_cache, .ruff_cache)\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask clean:logs\033[0m   verwijder logbestanden\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask clean:all\033[0m    verwijder .venv + caches\n"
        printf "  \033[32mtask uninstall\033[0m    verwijder .venv\n"
        printf "\n"

  ports:
    desc: Toon calcport-poorten voor dit project
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        if [ -f "{{.PORTS_FILE}}" ]; then
          printf "\033[1;36m=== {{.PORTS_FILE}} ===\033[0m\n"
          cat "{{.PORTS_FILE}}"
          printf "\n"
        elif command -v calcport >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          printf "\033[1;36m=== calcport output ===\033[0m\n"
          calcport
        else
          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m {{.PORTS_FILE}} ontbreekt en calcport niet in PATH\n"
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m fallback ports: backend.dev={{.BACKEND_DEV_PORT}} backend.prod={{.BACKEND_PROD_PORT}}\n"
        fi

  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # SETUP
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  setup:
    desc: Install dependencies + env bootstrap + health-check
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: _ensure-dirs
      - task: install
      - task: _bootstrap-env
      - touch "{{.DEPS_MARKER}}"
      - task: doctor
      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m setup voltooid\n"

  setup-quick:
    desc: Snelle setup (uv sync + env-bootstrap)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: _ensure-dirs
      - task: install
      - task: _bootstrap-env
      - touch "{{.DEPS_MARKER}}"
      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m quick setup voltooid\n"

  install:
    desc: Install dependencies (uv sync)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        if [ -f "uv.lock" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
          {{.UV}} sync
        else
          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m geen pyproject.toml of uv.lock gevonden\n"
          exit 1
        fi

  uninstall:
    desc: Verwijder .venv
    cmds:
      - |
        rm -rf .venv 2>/dev/null || true
        rm -f "{{.DEPS_MARKER}}" 2>/dev/null || true
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m .venv verwijderd\n"

  doctor:
    desc: Health-check (tooling + env + bestanden)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        FAIL=0; WARN=0
        ok()   { printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m   %s\n" "$1"; }
        bad()  { printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m  %s\n" "$1"; FAIL=$((FAIL+1)); }
        warn() { printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m %s\n" "$1"; WARN=$((WARN+1)); }
        need() { command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1 && ok "$1" || bad "$1 ontbreekt"; }
        maybe(){ command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1 && ok "$1" || warn "$1 ontbreekt (optioneel)"; }

        printf "\033[1;36m=== TOOLING ===\033[0m\n"
        need task; need git; need {{.UV}}; need {{.PYTHON}}
        need calcport; need lsof
        maybe docker

        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== BESTANDEN ===\033[0m\n"
        [ -f pyproject.toml ] && ok "pyproject.toml" || bad "pyproject.toml ontbreekt"
        [ -f uv.lock ] && ok "uv.lock" || warn "uv.lock ontbreekt (run 'task install')"
        [ -f "{{.PORTS_FILE}}" ] && ok "{{.PORTS_FILE}}" || warn "{{.PORTS_FILE}} ontbreekt (calcport fallback)"
        [ -f .env.local ] || [ -f .env ] && ok ".env(.local)" || warn ".env / .env.local ontbreekt"

        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== RUNTIME ===\033[0m\n"
        [ -d .venv ] && ok ".venv" || warn ".venv ontbreekt (run 'task install')"
        [ -d "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}" ] && ok "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/" || warn "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/ ontbreekt (wordt aangemaakt bij start)"

        PY_V=$({{.PYTHON}} --version 2>/dev/null)
        UV_V=$({{.UV}} --version 2>/dev/null)
        printf "\n\033[1m%s | %s\033[0m\n" "$PY_V" "$UV_V"

        printf "\n"
        [ "$FAIL" -gt 0 ] && printf "\033[31m%d critical issues\033[0m\n" "$FAIL" && exit 1
        [ "$WARN" -gt 0 ] && printf "\033[33m%d warnings\033[0m\n" "$WARN"
        printf "\033[32mDoctor: OK\033[0m\n"

  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # LIFECYCLE
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  start:
    desc: Start development server (uvicorn --reload)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: _ensure-ready
      - task: _ensure-dirs
      - task: _kill-mode
        vars:
          TARGET_PORT: '{{.BACKEND_DEV_PORT}}'
          PID_FILE: '{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/dev.pid'
      - |
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m starting {{.APP_NAME}} dev op poort {{.BACKEND_DEV_PORT}}...\n"
        : > "{{.DEV_LOG}}"
        DEV_CMD="{{.UV}} run uvicorn {{.APP_MODULE}} --host {{.HOST}} --port {{.BACKEND_DEV_PORT}} --reload"
        if command -v setsid >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          nohup setsid bash -lc "$DEV_CMD" >> "{{.DEV_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
        else
          nohup bash -lc "$DEV_CMD" >> "{{.DEV_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
        fi
      - task: _wait-for-endpoint
        vars:
          LABEL: development
          PORT: '{{.BACKEND_DEV_PORT}}'
          SCHEME: '{{.DEV_SCHEME}}'
          HOST: 127.0.0.1
          LOG_FILE: '{{.DEV_LOG}}'
      - |
        REAL_PID=$(fuser "{{.BACKEND_DEV_PORT}}"/tcp 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')
        if [ -z "$REAL_PID" ]; then
          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m server reageert maar PID kon niet bepaald worden op poort {{.BACKEND_DEV_PORT}}\n"
          exit 1
        fi
        echo "$REAL_PID" > "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/dev.pid"
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m dev server draait op {{.DEV_SCHEME}}://localhost:{{.BACKEND_DEV_PORT}} (PID %s)\n" "$REAL_PID"
      - task: _show-endpoints
        vars:
          LABEL: development
          PORT: '{{.BACKEND_DEV_PORT}}'
          SCHEME: '{{.DEV_SCHEME}}'

  start-prod:
    desc: Start productie server (geen --reload)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: _ensure-ready
      - task: _ensure-dirs
      - task: _kill-mode
        vars:
          TARGET_PORT: '{{.BACKEND_PROD_PORT}}'
          PID_FILE: '{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/prod.pid'
      - |
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m starting {{.APP_NAME}} prod op poort {{.BACKEND_PROD_PORT}}...\n"
        : > "{{.PROD_LOG}}"
        PROD_CMD="{{.UV}} run uvicorn {{.APP_MODULE}} --host {{.HOST}} --port {{.BACKEND_PROD_PORT}}"
        if command -v setsid >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          nohup setsid bash -lc "$PROD_CMD" >> "{{.PROD_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
        else
          nohup bash -lc "$PROD_CMD" >> "{{.PROD_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
        fi
      - task: _wait-for-endpoint
        vars:
          LABEL: production
          PORT: '{{.BACKEND_PROD_PORT}}'
          SCHEME: '{{.PROD_SCHEME}}'
          HOST: 127.0.0.1
          LOG_FILE: '{{.PROD_LOG}}'
      - |
        REAL_PID=$(fuser "{{.BACKEND_PROD_PORT}}"/tcp 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')
        if [ -z "$REAL_PID" ]; then
          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m prod server reageert maar PID kon niet bepaald worden op poort {{.BACKEND_PROD_PORT}}\n"
          exit 1
        fi
        echo "$REAL_PID" > "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/prod.pid"
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m prod server draait op {{.PROD_SCHEME}}://localhost:{{.BACKEND_PROD_PORT}} (PID %s)\n" "$REAL_PID"
      - task: _show-endpoints
        vars:
          LABEL: production
          PORT: '{{.BACKEND_PROD_PORT}}'
          SCHEME: '{{.PROD_SCHEME}}'

  stop:
    desc: Stop alle services
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        STOPPED=0
        for NAME in dev prod; do
          if [ "$NAME" = "dev" ]; then PORT="{{.BACKEND_DEV_PORT}}"; else PORT="{{.BACKEND_PROD_PORT}}"; fi
          PIDFILE="{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/${NAME}.pid"
          # Stop via PID-bestand
          if [ -f "$PIDFILE" ]; then
            PID=$(head -1 "$PIDFILE" 2>/dev/null)
            if /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null; then
              /bin/kill -TERM "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
              W=0
              while /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && [ "$W" -lt "{{.STOP_TIMEOUT}}" ]; do
                sleep 1; W=$((W+1))
              done
              /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && /bin/kill -KILL "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
              printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m %s gestopt (PID %s)\n" "$NAME" "$PID"
              STOPPED=1
            fi
            rm -f "$PIDFILE"
          fi
          # Fallback: orphan-cleanup op poort (uvicorn child-workers)
          if fuser "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            fuser -k "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
            sleep 1
            fuser "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 && fuser -k -KILL "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
            printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m %s gestopt via poort %s (orphan cleanup)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT"
            STOPPED=1
          fi
        done
        if [ "$STOPPED" = "0" ]; then
          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m geen draaiende services gevonden\n"
        fi

  restart:
    desc: Herstart development server
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: stop
      - sleep 1
      - task: start

  status:
    desc: Service status (dev + prod)
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        _port_online() {
          local P="$1"
          local S="$2"
          local CURL_EXTRA=""
          [ "$S" = "https" ] && CURL_EXTRA="-k"
          if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "${S}://127.0.0.1:${P}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
            [ "$CODE" != "000" ] && return 0
          fi
          if command -v fuser >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            fuser "$P"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 && return 0
          fi
          return 1
        }
        printf "\033[1;36m=== service status ===\033[0m\n"
        for NAME in dev prod; do
          if [ "$NAME" = "dev" ]; then
            PORT="{{.BACKEND_DEV_PORT}}"; SCHEME="{{.DEV_SCHEME}}"
          else
            PORT="{{.BACKEND_PROD_PORT}}"; SCHEME="{{.PROD_SCHEME}}"
          fi
          PIDFILE="{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/${NAME}.pid"
          PID=""
          [ -f "$PIDFILE" ] && PID=$(head -1 "$PIDFILE" 2>/dev/null || true)
          PID_RUNNING=0
          [ -n "$PID" ] && /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && PID_RUNNING=1
          if _port_online "$PORT" "$SCHEME"; then
            if [ "$PID_RUNNING" = "1" ]; then
              printf "\033[32m[RUNNING]\033[0m  %s  (poort %s, PID %s)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT" "$PID"
            else
              printf "\033[33m[RUNNING]\033[0m  %s  (poort %s, niet via task gestart)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT"
            fi
          elif [ "$PID_RUNNING" = "1" ]; then
            printf "\033[33m[STARTING]\033[0m %s  (proces actief, poort %s nog niet online)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT"
          else
            [ -n "$PID" ] && rm -f "$PIDFILE" 2>/dev/null || true
            printf "\033[31m[STOPPED]\033[0m  %s\n" "$NAME"
          fi
        done
      - task: _show-endpoints
        vars:
          LABEL: development
          PORT: '{{.BACKEND_DEV_PORT}}'
          SCHEME: '{{.DEV_SCHEME}}'

  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # LOGS
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  logs:
    desc: Volg dev logs
    cmds:
      - |
        test -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}" || { printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m geen logbestand ({{.DEV_LOG}})\n"; exit 0; }
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m volgen van {{.DEV_LOG}} (Ctrl+C om te stoppen)\n"
        tail -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}"

  logs-tail:
    desc: Laatste 50 regels + follow
    cmds:
      - |
        test -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}" || { printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m geen logbestand\n"; exit 0; }
        tail -n 50 -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}"

  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # MAINTENANCE
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  clean:
    desc: Verwijder Python caches
    cmds:
      - |
        find . -type d -name "__pycache__" -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
        find . -type d -name ".pytest_cache" -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
        find . -type d -name ".ruff_cache" -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
        find . -type d -name ".mypy_cache" -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
        find . -type f -name "*.pyc" -delete 2>/dev/null || true
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m caches opgeruimd\n"

  clean-logs:
    desc: Verwijder logbestanden
    cmds:
      - |
        rm -rf "{{.LOGS_DIR}}" 2>/dev/null || true
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m logs opgeruimd\n"

  clean-all:
    desc: Verwijder .venv + caches
    cmds:
      - task: uninstall
      - task: clean
      - |
        rm -rf "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}" 2>/dev/null || true
        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m alles opgeruimd\n"

  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # INTERNAL building blocks (gen-3)
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  _bootstrap-env:
    internal: true
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        if [ -f ".env.local" ] || [ -f ".env" ]; then exit 0; fi
        if [ -f ".env.example" ]; then
          cp .env.example .env.local
          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m .env.local aangemaakt vanuit .env.example\n"
          exit 0
        fi
        if [ -f ".env.local.example" ]; then
          cp .env.local.example .env.local
          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m .env.local aangemaakt vanuit .env.local.example\n"
          exit 0
        fi
        printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m geen .env/.env.local en geen template gevonden; sla over\n"

  _ensure-ready:
    internal: true
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - task: _ensure-dirs
      - |
        _has() { command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; }
        MISSING=""
        _has {{.UV}}     || MISSING="$MISSING {{.UV}}"
        _has {{.PYTHON}} || MISSING="$MISSING {{.PYTHON}}"
        if [ -n "$MISSING" ]; then
          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m ontbrekende tools:%s\n" "$MISSING"
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m installeer ontbrekende tooling en run 'task setup'\n"
          exit 1
        fi

        NEED_SETUP=0
        REASONS=""

        # .venv afwezig of marker afwezig
        if [ ! -d ".venv" ] || [ ! -f "{{.DEPS_MARKER}}" ]; then
          NEED_SETUP=1
          REASONS="$REASONS dependencies"
        fi

        # pyproject.toml nieuwer dan marker
        if [ -f "{{.DEPS_MARKER}}" ] && [ -f "pyproject.toml" ] && [ "pyproject.toml" -nt "{{.DEPS_MARKER}}" ]; then
          NEED_SETUP=1
          REASONS="$REASONS pyproject.toml"
        fi

        # uv.lock nieuwer dan marker
        if [ -f "{{.DEPS_MARKER}}" ] && [ -f "uv.lock" ] && [ "uv.lock" -nt "{{.DEPS_MARKER}}" ]; then
          NEED_SETUP=1
          REASONS="$REASONS uv.lock"
        fi

        # env-bestand mist en template aanwezig
        if [ ! -f ".env" ] && [ ! -f ".env.local" ] && { [ -f ".env.example" ] || [ -f ".env.local.example" ]; }; then
          NEED_SETUP=1
          REASONS="$REASONS env"
        fi

        if [ "$NEED_SETUP" = "1" ]; then
          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m onvolledige setup gedetecteerd:%s\n" "$REASONS"
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m voer automatisch 'task setup' uit...\n"
          task setup
        fi

  _ensure-dirs:
    internal: true
    cmds:
      - mkdir -p "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}" "{{.LOGS_DIR}}"
    status:
      - test -d "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}"
      - test -d "{{.LOGS_DIR}}"

  _kill-mode:
    # Stopt een bestaande service: PID-bestand → fuser orphan-cleanup
    internal: true
    vars:
      TARGET_PORT: '{{default "0" .TARGET_PORT}}'
      PID_FILE: '{{default "" .PID_FILE}}'
    cmds:
      - |
        _stop_timeout="{{.STOP_TIMEOUT}}"
        _pidfile="{{.PID_FILE}}"
        _port="{{.TARGET_PORT}}"
        if [ -f "$_pidfile" ]; then
          PID=$(head -1 "$_pidfile" 2>/dev/null)
          if /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null; then
            /bin/kill -TERM "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
            W=0
            while /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && [ "$W" -lt "$_stop_timeout" ]; do
              sleep 1; W=$((W+1))
            done
            /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && /bin/kill -KILL "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
          fi
          rm -f "$_pidfile"
        fi
        if [ "$_port" != "0" ] && fuser "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          fuser -k "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
          sleep 1
          fuser "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 && fuser -k -KILL "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
        fi

  _wait-for-endpoint:
    internal: true
    silent: false
    vars:
      LABEL: '{{default "service" .LABEL}}'
      PORT: '{{default "0" .PORT}}'
      SCHEME: '{{default "http" .SCHEME}}'
      HOST: '{{default "127.0.0.1" .HOST}}'
      LOG_FILE: '{{default "" .LOG_FILE}}'
    cmds:
      - |
        URL="{{.SCHEME}}://{{.HOST}}:{{.PORT}}/"
        CURL_EXTRA=""
        [ "{{.SCHEME}}" = "https" ] && CURL_EXTRA="-k"
        ELAPSED=0
        READY=0
        while [ "$ELAPSED" -lt "{{.START_TIMEOUT}}" ]; do
          if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "$URL" 2>/dev/null || true)"
            if [ -n "$CODE" ] && [ "$CODE" != "000" ]; then
              READY=1; break
            fi
          elif command -v fuser >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            if fuser "{{.PORT}}"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
              READY=1; break
            fi
          fi
          sleep 1
          ELAPSED=$((ELAPSED + 1))
        done
        if [ "$READY" != "1" ]; then
          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m start mislukt — {{.LABEL}} endpoint %s reageert niet na {{.START_TIMEOUT}}s\n" "$URL"
          [ -n "{{.LOG_FILE}}" ] && tail -n 20 "{{.LOG_FILE}}" 2>/dev/null || true
          exit 1
        fi

  _show-endpoints:
    # Multi-iface VPN-detectie:
    # 1) nmcli connected wireguard|vpn|tun|tap
    # 2) ip -o -4 addr op tun|tap|wg|tailscale|ppp|utun|zt|vpn
    # 3) RFC1918 fallback, exclude lo|docker|br-|veth|virbr|en|eth|wl|wwan
    # 4) 10.0.0.x specifieke fallback
    internal: true
    silent: false
    cmds:
      - |
        LABEL="{{.LABEL}}"
        PORT="{{.PORT}}"
        SCHEME="{{default "http" .SCHEME}}"
        LOCAL_HOST="127.0.0.1"
        if [ -n "$LABEL" ]; then
          printf "\033[1;36m=== %s endpoints ===\033[0m\n" "$LABEL"
        fi
        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m local url: %s://localhost:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$PORT"

        VPN_IP=""
        VPN_IF=""
        if command -v nmcli >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          VPN_IF="$(nmcli -t -f DEVICE,TYPE,STATE device status 2>/dev/null | awk -F: '$3 ~ /^connected/ && $2 ~ /^(wireguard|vpn|tun|tap)$/ {print $1; exit}')"
          if [ -n "$VPN_IF" ] && command -v ip >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            VPN_IP="$(ip -o -4 addr show dev "$VPN_IF" scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $4; exit}')"
            VPN_IP="${VPN_IP%/*}"
          fi
        fi

        if command -v ip >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ]; then
            VPN_LINE="$(ip -o -4 addr show up scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '$2 ~ /^(tun|tap|wg|tailscale|ppp|utun|zt|vpn)/ {print $2, $4; exit}')"
          fi
          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ] && [ -z "$VPN_LINE" ]; then
            VPN_LINE="$(ip -o -4 addr show up scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '$2 !~ /^(lo|docker0|br-|veth|virbr|en|eth|wl|wwan)/ && $4 ~ /^(10\\.|172\\.(1[6-9]|2[0-9]|3[0-1])\\.|192\\.168\\.)/ {print $2, $4; exit}')"
          fi
          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ] && [ -z "$VPN_LINE" ]; then
            VPN_LINE="$(ip -o -4 addr show up scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '$4 ~ /^10\\.0\\.0\\./ {print $2, $4; exit}')"
          fi
          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ] && [ -n "$VPN_LINE" ]; then
            set -- $VPN_LINE
            VPN_IF="${VPN_IF:-$1}"
            VPN_IP="${2%/*}"
          fi
        fi

        if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn ip:    %s\n" "$VPN_IP"
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn iface: %s\n" "${VPN_IF:-niet beschikbaar}"
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn url:   %s://%s:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$VPN_IP" "$PORT"
        else
          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn ip:    niet beschikbaar\n"
        fi

        if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          CURL_EXTRA=""
          [ "$SCHEME" = "https" ] && CURL_EXTRA="-k"
          LOCAL_CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "${SCHEME}://${LOCAL_HOST}:${PORT}/" 2>/dev/null || true)"
          if [ -n "$LOCAL_CODE" ] && [ "$LOCAL_CODE" != "000" ]; then
            printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m local endpoint reageert (%s)\n" "$LOCAL_CODE"
          else
            printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m local endpoint reageert niet via %s://%s:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$LOCAL_HOST" "$PORT"
          fi
          if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
            VPN_CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "${SCHEME}://${VPN_IP}:${PORT}/" 2>/dev/null || true)"
            if [ -n "$VPN_CODE" ] && [ "$VPN_CODE" != "000" ]; then
              printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m vpn endpoint reageert (%s)\n" "$VPN_CODE"
            else
              printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m vpn endpoint reageert niet via %s://%s:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$VPN_IP" "$PORT"
            fi
          fi
        fi
